body: Full disclosure I’ve been using Bur Bur oil since October and only just picked this up a few weeks ago. I fear consistency actually is key. Re making your hair look greasy, yeah it does. I put this in at night. Do I shower beforehand so I have *freshly* cleaned hair? Nah. I wash my hair every morning and I don’t use a ton of product near my roots. I find my scalp is clean enough for it to still be effective if I put it on at the end of the day. It washes out cleanly in the morning. Another thing, I could see this drying out your scalp if you didn’t do any other kind of deep hydrating. Between Bur Bur and the Amika hydrorush line my bases seem to be covered. If you’re experiencing flakiness, I’d consider a focusing on scalp detox and hydration.

This actually works. I experienced sudden hair loss exacerbated by a bad product that lead to my shedding almost half of my total hair density in the span of a month! I have fine, thin yet generally strong hair, but noticed that through the hair loss event not only did my scalp get very sensitive and develop a dull ache, but also my existing hairs displayed a weakened effect (would bend and get indented easier than usual), both of which were first-time experiences for me. I'm sharing this only because I feel the efficacy of this product might have something to do with my personal situation (which is not chronic), and may or may not be helpful for others. With all this being said - I noticed substantial hair growth within 3 weeks! Currently its been about 5, and I am going to need a hat now, as it looks like I have a buzz cut underneath the rest of my hair - that's all of the new growth forming! I am so excited and so thankful to experience such a quick turnaround in my situation. Also, I did take a daily hair/nail (biotin) supplement to enhance any effects, and although I'm sure its helped my results, I know that this product was the superhero in all of this, because I noticed hair growth only happening in my application areas. One side of my head is absolutely teeming with growth and if I had known 5 weeks ago this would work so well, I would have applied it more evenly throughout. Let my experience be a tip for you. Highly highly recommend you give this product a try - and if you do, make sure to apply evenly all over :)

So to start I have a few health conditions that limit what I can use (can’t use rogaine because it interacts with blood pressure) and one health condition means I take a medication to prevent migraines called carbamazepine (aka tegretol). I noticed my hair was looking less dense after the five years of being on it and hair thinning can be a side effect so I thought to try this. I did a tiny section above my ear as a patch test and within 10 minutes I got it tingling on that side of my face like to be expected, but it triggered the nerve pain I get in my face only on that side (at first). If you take blood pressure meds and have ever tried the medication Midodrine the tingling feels like that (before it flared my nerve pain). Pretty unpleasant. I did have an allergic reaction to it which NEVER has happened to me before and had to wash it off after an hour and a half on, along with taking a Benadryl because my throat felt weird. I get Botox for muscle spasms and once it made my throat numb for like 3 weeks and it feels exactly like that which is scary. And now I’m going to take a second Benadryl and stay up to monitor myself just in case it gets worse because even though I washed it off, I’m still having mild chest tightness but thankfully it’s improving and I live five minutes from the hospital in Canada and have an EpiPen at home in case I need it because my mom has many allergies. I am positive it was triggered by this because throat immediately improved after shower, still have nerve pain and now a NASTY headache with tmj pain though :( Maybe if you didn’t have an allergic reaction to it it wouldn’t flare your nerve pain and tmj, but it was the initial tingling that set it off and I wouldn’t risk it if you deal with that too. Thankfully I’ll be fine but the nerve pain? No thanks

title: Noticeably less oily scalp after <2-3 weeks of use
body: Lost a lot of hair due to telogen effluvium. Every hair wash day was an emotional event. Once I removed the trigger (a new med) the hair fall stopped about a month later. I started using this serum and I had baby hairs growing all around my hairline within a couple weeks. My widows peaks are now more filled in than ever.

I've been using this hair serum for two months, so I can't speak to its long-term effects on hair growth just yet (it’s supposed to take over 3 months of consistent use to see results). However, what I did notice within 2–3 weeks is a major improvement in how oily my scalp gets. I used to wash my hair every day or every other day because by Day 2 after a wash (I wash at night), my scalp and hair would look greasy and unkempt—no matter what I did. Since incorporating this serum into my routine (I use it 4–6 times a week), I now don't feel the need to wash my hair until Day 4 or 5, which is a huge change for me. This has never happened in my life. For context, I have straight hair and generally normal-to-dry skin aside from my previously oily scalp. I did start using the “It’s a 10” Charcoal Shampoo as a second wash about 3–4 months ago ( I always shampooed twice though), which may contribute, but I skipped it recently and my scalp still stayed balanced. So I really think the serum is doing the heavy lifting. Also, that scratchy/painful spot at the back of the head after 3-4 days of not washing is gone. Overall, I'm super happy with finally achieving the goal of washing my hair twice a week instead of 4-5 times. A bottle (60mL) lasts for about 3 months with consistent use and I just reordered my second one.

title: Slow and steady
body: I have been using this since so long and its results are amazing. Love this product.

I think a lot of the negative reviews aren’t being realistic with their expectations of 1) how much new hair growth this will cause and 2) how fast it will work. This serum should be used as part of a routine and with the expectation that any change will take a few weeks minimum. After a couple rounds of bleaching, I had noticeably thinning hair and outright bald spots in some areas that were making me horribly self conscious. I’ve been using this for two months and while the really bad areas are still visibly thinner than the rest of my scalp, I’ve noticed a big improvement. My follicles are visibly darker and healthier, and I’ve noticed new growth on my hairline with less hair fall as well. Of course this isn’t a magic bullet, if you’re expecting to go from bald to waist length hair in a week nothing OTC will do that. But in conjunction with scalp massage, vitamins, and taking steps to reduce my shedding it’s been a huge help. I like how fast it absorbs too.

My Hair Journey I've always struggled with fine, thinning hair, especially around my hairline. After hearing so many rave reviews about this serum, I decided to give it a try. The price point is super affordable, which is a huge plus! ### Application & First Impressions The serum itself is lightweight and non-greasy, which I love. I apply it every night before bed, massaging it gently into my scalp. It absorbs quickly, so there's no mess on my pillowcase. The scent is subtle and pleasant, nothing overpowering. ### Results Over Time After using it consistently for about three months, I started noticing some exciting changes. My hair feels denser and looks visibly fuller. I even spotted some new baby hairs sprouting along my hairline! 🎉 My scalp feels healthier, and there's a noticeable reduction in hair shedding. ### Key Ingredients This serum is packed with peptides, caffeine, and biotin, which are known to support hair growth and density. The peptides help strengthen the hair, while caffeine stimulates the scalp, and biotin promotes overall hair health⁵⁶. ### Final Thoughts Overall, I'm thrilled with the results. The Ordinary Multi-Peptide Serum for Hair Density has become a staple in my hair care routine. It's not a miracle cure, but with patience and consistent use, it definitely delivers on its promises. If you're struggling with thinning hair, I highly recommend giving this serum a try. 💁‍♀️

The formula contains a blend of six peptides, as well as ingredients like caffeine and redensyl, that work together to stimulate hair growth. The texture of the serum is lightweight and fast-absorbing - it doesn't leave my hair feeling greasy or weighed down. I massage it directly onto my scalp 1-2 times per day and style as usual. The Ordinary Hair Growth Serum is crafted to promote thicker, fuller hair and reduce hair loss. It targets individuals experiencing thinning hair or hair loss, aiming to improve hair density and overall scalp health within a month of regular use. Consistent use of the serum appears to stimulate hair growth and enhance hair density. Its blend of ingredients focuses on creating an optimal environment for hair growth, addressing issues like poor circulation and weak hair follicles. The lightweight formula is easy to apply and absorbs quickly, leaving no greasy residue. However, as with any hair growth product, results can vary depending on individual hair types and conditions. The Ordinary Hair Growth Serum is perfect for anyone noticing early signs of thinning hair or hair loss and seeking a vegan, cruelty-free solution. title: My hair grows very quickly
body: This product should NOT be labeled "Gluten free" as it contains triticum vulgare germ extract- wheat germ oil extract. Depending on the quality of the refining process it could be gluten free, but usually there often does contain a very small amount of gluten. "According to celiac centers in the United States and Canada wheat germ oil is not a safe product for celiacs and gluten intolerant individuals." GlutenFreeRN website. As I've read through quite a few reviews there has been cases of irritation to the scalp along with redness, hairloss, and other symptoms. I'm guessing that some of these people may have a sensitivity or allergy to gluten or wheat. Use with caution if you have Celiac disease, gluten intolerance or sensitivity or wheat allergy. As far as how the product works, I have not used it so, I cannot say. I just wanted to let people know there could be a problem for certain individuals.

If Ordinary really wanted to create very useful product in this category it would change the suspension from an oil to water-based. Those with hair loss and very fine or thinning hair shouldn't wash their hair every day as it is too aggressive on the scalp and hair follicles, and this product forces you to wash hair daily so it isn't greasy. title: Worked for my thinning hair
body: Finally deciding to write a review after around 5mo of using this consistently and being around halfway through the bottle. I use this right out of the shower after blow drying my hair and I'll drop a bit onto my fingertips and massage it into my scalp, mainly focusing on the hairline and top of my head. I found this to be the quickest way to apply it evenly. I was losing a lot of hair for a few months before starting the serum and noticed my hair was a lot less dense. After around 1mo I noticed a definite increase in my baby hairs and even now I have quite a bit more baby hairs than usual. My hair definitely feels thicker now that it's grown out more and I also think the serum helped my hair grow faster. I do want to mention that I also started taking vitamins for hair growth around the same time but it was after already seeing results from the serum. I'm sure both played a big part in helping to grow my hair. I have pretty oily scalp so I was worried about the residue but I don't find it uncomfortable or heavy at all. Only thing is I find using the dropper a bit annoying and a bit messy for me so I wish there was an easier delivery system like making it a spray or something.

title: User beware
body: I started noticing hair loss a couple of weeks ago around my hairline and around my hair part... I couldn't quite figure out why I was experiencing hair loss (looking back at it now it was probably stress) but I turned to this product and I'm so glad I did! I've been using it now for about three weeks consistently almost every night. Even though it's only been three weeks, I noticed that the hair around my hairline has filled in a lot! I used to have a lot of gaps/bald spots around my hairline but it's noticeably filled in now. I haven't seen results yet on my parting yet, so I'm hoping that continued use will help :) Without the product, my hair does grow quite fast though, but this really helped with the density of my hair. That being said I do skip it on the nights I do wash my hair, just because I don't love the feeling of it on. It feels a little "dirty" and definitely makes my hair look greasy upon the initial application (which is why I took off a star), but by the morning it looks and feels fine. I find that the best way to apply this product is to first drop it onto your hands and then rub it between your fingers to massage into your scalp. I've seen most people use the dropper directly on their hair, but for me that didn't quite cover all of my scalp and that way wastes too much product. I'm definitely adding this to my routine now and am excited to see the long-term results! I'm just upset I didn't take any progress pictures because I'm pleasantly surprised with the results lol.

I'm primarily using it to make my hair grow faster/longer and I believe it is working. Like many others, I also noticed that the health of my scalp seemed better once I started using this. For the price, I recommend it.

Hair loss or thinning doesn’t happen overnight. And therefore, doesn’t get fixed overnight. I just started my third bottle and I can say that I’m finally FEELING a difference in the girl of my ponytails. I could feel it on my scalp earlier, but it’s encouraging more growth continuously. Love it.

title: Worked so well for me!
body: These before and after pics are starting in Nov through January. I used this once almost every night. I can definitely see a difference in those short months. I was having some hair loss along my temples and hairline, I'm not sure if it was pp (I have a 1.5 year old) or that I'm still nursing, hormonal or my age I just turned 40. whatever the reason, this has definitely helped me.

I had a spot where hair had started to thin from picking at my scalp condition, and this serum legitimately grew my hair back in 2 weeks. It has also never been more thick/dense and also so SOFT!! I wish I had the before and after photos to accompany this review. I wasn't sure if it would work based on the 4 stars it has, but I can safely say it definitely worked for me! I even use it on my eyebrows when I notice a little bald patch where some hairs fell out here and there. Highly highly recommend!!

It has not helped me, I don't think I would use or buy this again. I will try with a different product once it's gone.

I read all the reviews before buying and I am a huge fan of The Ordinary, but I was skeptical of the fact that many said their hair was not oily after putting this on fresh hair. I have been using it a couple weeks now and it does ruin my fresh hair after putting it in sadly. Perhaps it depends on hair type, but sadly I cannot use this daily unless I wash my hair daily or every two days. I have now decided to use it the a day or two before my wash only, but I have a feeling it will not work to its full potential this way.

title: Great product

body: Safe to say, this product is now a staple in my life. These pics are a month apart. Note that I use this product every night - pretty consistent.

title: Amazing. New hair growth!!
body: I have thin hair, after pregnancy it has been unbearable. I’m basically balding around the ears. I figured I would try this…. I don’t religious use this, I was my hair 2 times a week and put it in that night. I have been using this for about 6 weeks now (1/2 a bottle is gone) and check out these photos my hair dresser snapped last week when I got my hair done! Exciting. It goes on greasy, and is fine but the morning.

title: Great for baldish spots
body: I have used this serum twice now and noticed that my (really fine) individual strands of hair became coarser. I have widows peaks/bald spots where I have barely any hair only really fine short ones, but after using this my hair filled in. It didn't take too long to see results about 3 weeks of using it every night. It can make your hair a little greasy but I find it absorbs pretty well. I stoped using the serum after finishing one bottle and my hair slowly went back to having bald spots and the individual strands got finer again so I repurchased and am seeing regrowth after using it again for a few weeks. I make sure to put it on my roots throughout my hair and then massage it in for like 2-3 minutes every night. Overall good product to try :)

title: Wow.
body: I went to the hair salon in early October, bought this Oct 20th, went back this week and my hair stylist just randomly mentioned (without me saying anything) that my baby hairs are growing in. I've been using this specifically in that area and have had thin baby hairs forever. The only thing I've changed since my last visit is using this consistently (4/5 times a week). HIGHLY recommend. I have no clue if this actually grows hair but it's made it look denser and feel denser so it's definitely done what it says it does.
Love this serum. It really helped me with post-partum hair loss. I noticed a difference within two weeks using it every night. Definitely would recommend.

title: Great to control frizz
body: I've been using this for a couple weeks. I'm a very lazy girl, I try to wash my hair once a week. This product has helped with my scalp to not feel itchy or ache especially later in the week. I'm not sure about the hair density, still remains to be seen. I love how it feels. It's very light weight, no perfume smell. I have long straight black hair.

title: Worthh everything
body: Didn’t think it would work like most products like this. I saw some regrowth but ultimately fell in love with its ability to control my frizzy hair. I use it to calm my hair down when it’s frizzy now instead lol.

title: SAVED MY EYEBROWS!!!
body: I 100% recommend this product. I have lost so much hair due to stress (I even started having bald spots on my head). I purchased this product in August and now all my bald spots are gone and my hair has grown much fuller. Also I have noticed so much baby hairs growing!! I strongly recommend if you are looking to have much fuller looking hair and to have hair grow back on the bald spots!

title: love
body: This is reallly so awesome product, use consistently and it is worth it!!

This stuff is WITCHCRAFT. In a moment of youthful idiocy, I plucked my eyebrows way too far apart. They stayed that way for YEARS until I decided to give this stuff a go. Two days later (seriously) there were little baby hairs starting to sprout in the bare spots. After a few months of using this regularly, my eyebrows have fully returned to their original shape and are so well grown back in, you would never guess I had done anything to them. I am delighted. Seriously, it's spooky how well this stuff works!
i’ve been using this product 20 minutes before i wash my hair for the past few weeks and you can definitely see the density difference. my hair is so much fuller

title: Less fallout so effective yet slightly oily

body: Haven’t noticed a difference in hair thickness. I used this product for about 3 months. However it seemed to strengthen it. Less hair has fallen out while using it

title: this stuff works!
body: I was diagnosed with alopecia areata which is basically a fancy way of saying that stress has caused your immune system to attack your hair follicles and results in moderate hair loss. My main areas of concern are my temples, the very front of my hairline, and the back top of my scalp. I have been using this for over a month now pretty much everyday and you can definitely see where the baby hairs are coming back on my temples and the front of my hair! Even my stylists mentioned it the other day. Using this bottle every day with my shoulder length hair (I do only use it on my scalp as directed) and in the 4-5 different areas I bet this bottle will last me at least 2 months. The other thing that I love about this serum other than the fact that it actually works and is very affordable is that it does not weigh down my fine thin hair nor does it leave me with an oily scalp which is an issue I have already. I can style my hair and you can't tell that I have the serum in it. I can't recommend this serum highly enough. If you have hair loss especially because of stress or environmental issues please give this a try. I will say that I did notice my hair regrowth slowed/stopped when I did not use this for 2 weeks but I did not loose any extra hair and what I had grown back stayed. I do think this is something that you will have to continue to use but it's not as rigid of a regiment as say Rogaine.

title: must buy again

title: Grows my hair especially edges!

This works awesome! If your roots get a bit oily then use dry shampoo after letting it soak in for a bit and then it's fine. I am allergic to minoxidil and can't use it so this is a really great alternative for me that actually works!!

title: Good product but won't buy it again

The price point is great and it has so many mixed reviews, so if you're thinking of giving it a try and it doesnt work you wont feel bad for the money spent! I love how the serum felt on my scalp, its nicer than oily products for hair growth. Little baby hairs started appearing after the first week however it dried my hair after using it daily and hair feels unclean the next day, I always have the feel/need to wash my hair the next day. Nice product to try but wouldnt buy it again.

title: Will repurchase even if I won't be Rapunzel
body: I used a whole bottle of this and didn't feel like I got any results. I applied to sparse areas like my part, temples and top parts of my head every single night and didn't really see any difference in hair density or regrowth at all. I don't even think this worked to prevent further hair loss. It seemed the daily shedding was the same. Not a repurchase for me. Boo. This also made my hair look kind of greasy in the morning after letting it soak in overnight.

I bought this exactly a month ago. I had been using it on and off the first two weeks because I'm horrible at starting a new routine. Then every night before bed the past two weeks. It's way to early to tell of it actually has an effect on hair growth but I have noticed some changes whenever I use this. 1. My hair feels like it stays cleaner for longer. I've noticed every time I use this my hair doesn't tend to get as oily by the fourth day of not washing hair, usually it would be noticably oily by day 2-3. 2. My hair does feel super soft and somewhat thicker. I definitely feel it has to do more with me not needing to wash my hair as often that it does feel thicker and smoother. However, this product still has some effect on the healthier appearance and feel of the hair, especially closer to the scalp. 3. The scent is very pleasant to me. It's not very strong and has a very nice almost sweet note. Definitely something herbal or fruity but I really like it.

title: Did Nothing
body: I love The Ordinary, this is actually the first product I've tried from them that I won't repurchase. I used it for almost 6 months, and there wasn't any difference at all. I took photos monthly, and if I wasn't more tan in the later pics, I wouldn't be able to tell the difference between the photos. So not only did I not see any results, it's also a pretty pesky product to work with. you really can only use 2 drops on each side of your scalp, if you use anymore than that, your hair will look and feel disgusting and greasy, and just gross. I really do love The Ordinary, and id recommend a ton of their skincare, but from what I tried, and what I've heard from others, their hair care line is a big miss. I also tried their other hair serum, and didn't notice any difference with that one also.

title: What A Difference!
body: I'm 55 and I recently had to go on a medication that really made my hair fall out at my crown. I freaked! I already had a bit of hair loss at my temples but this was really bad. I started taking biotin vitamins and I have been really faithful with this product. I'm happy to say that the hair at my temples has all come back, it's really grey, but it's back! The crown is definitely improving, I would say at least 50% better after a month. I can't stop the meds so this is definitely helping for now, at least it's not going to get worse! Very easy to use, it's not greasy or messy. Just a few drops and massage it in. I will be buying again!

title: Really works

Highly recommend hair has grown alot within 4 months of using this

I had brain surgery last year that left a scalp scar where hair won’t grow so I’m trying to minimize it by bulking up the hair around it. I also noticed some general thinning at the front of my head. The dropper is easy to use and get on the scalp and the formula doesn’t seem to make my hair greasy or anything. It does definitely get the surrounding hair wet and since the directions say to apply to dry hair, I have to go back and blow dry it if I’m going out but mostly I use it before bed. If nothing else, there hasn’t been any more noticeable thinning since I started using it so Im sticking with it. First photo is before, second is one month of daily use.

title: Not Densifying-but Thinning

You cannot make dead hair follicles produce hair again, you can only improve the hair growing from live follicles. There are no miracle hair/scalp serums that will revive dead follicles. This does make my hair look thicker, doesn't mean the strands are thicker. I don't have any additional fallout as others have mentioned.

I don’t think this works really. I used the grande lash hair serum and had fast results. I changed to this one to save money and it didn’t seem to have any noticeable results.

Honestly, I wish I would’ve just dealt with my thin hair rather than trying to fix it with this product because it was a waste of money.

I was seeing hair thinning on the corners of my hairline and after using this product intermittently for about 6 months, I'm noticing that I have a lot of baby hairs growing in spots where it had been thin before. I'm about to restock on this product and keep using it for the long term. title: IT WORKS!!
body: So I use a detox shampoo, which helps with removing any product build up and debris on my scalp. I believe this helped the product absorb a lot better. I also use a hair mask too. I wash my hair once a week, and so I only apply the product once a week. For some reason, it helped me remove my dandruff, which is a plus!! Love love it!!

My understanding is that hair needs 4 things to grow: - Proper nutrition (vitamins and minerals) - Bloodflow to the hair follicles (to help transport the good stuff to where it needs to be used) - Protein for hair structure - Moisture for softness, flexibility and shine (and scalp health!!!) In my experience (at about a quarter way through the bottle), this formula basically works like a leave-in protein treatment. As soon as I used it, it gave me an immediate volume boost (in appearance at least) by making my roots look less stringy and limp against my scalp. Within about a week, I started to see significant change in my curl and wave pattern. Where before, my curls and waves were limp, completely abandoning me the second I put a comb to my hair, now, they were holding up. My ends got curly, the middle of my hair got wavier, and my waves even moved up all the way to my scalp. That being said, this formula WILL dry your hair out. Not because it removes existing moisture, in fact, it seems to have quite a few moisturizing ingredients, but because protein and moisture need to be balanced! Too much protein relative to moisture will make your hair dry and brittle, too much moisture will make it stringy and structureless, and too little of both will leave you with dull, lifeless hair that breaks, falls out and looks like straw. Unfortunately, as it exists, the moisturizing ingredients in this formula are not sufficient to balance the protein it seems to add. So most people will need to supplement this with a good moisturizing treatment and deep condition. I try to use 100% squalane oil to help keep my hair moisturized in between washes and condition treatments (applied to the scalp and then brushed or combed through the hair). Overall, make sure to get a good assessment of what your hair needs. This product is great for those whose hair craves protein.

I found when I really started massaging it in, it helped with the grease! I also have a powdered dry shampoo which helps in the am. After about a month (and half'ish a bottle) I have lots of little baby hairs growing that are way more noticeable, and my fine strands feel stronger. I'm not suggesting it is ONLY due to this product as I have been combining it with a twice-weekly hair mask, but I see a difference and will definitely keep using it.

title: Good product!
body: I know a lot of people have said this product leaves an oily residue - short term I definitely found it did, but by the next morning it had dried down enough it was unnoticeable. I applied a generous amount (considerably more than just 1 dropper full) followed by a 5-20 minute scalp massage, depending on how much time I had. I've definitely noticed a lot of new baby hairs coming through where my hair had been thinning, it's been about 4 months of use. I'm happy with the progress, re-growing hair is a marathon not a sprint! I hate how huge companies prey on the insecurities of people, and enjoy massive profit margins on wild claims for basic products. I think this is priced a lot more reasonably than other similar products (sometimes priced upwards of $80!), and I have seen progress with consistent use. However, I also started paying a lot more attention to my scalp health in general and saw a healthcare provider, both of which are important if you're dealing with unusual thinning! I will continue to use this product in combination with a few others that I've found useful. Overall I would recommend :)

I know the science says that the ingredients in this product can't regrow hair but my experience says otherwise. After just three weeks of applying this nightly to the trouble areas my hair is fuller. There is new hair growth. Plus, my hair feels and looks better. No more clumps coming out when conditioning. I can't believe how much better it is in such a short time. I am a believer. Plus I have barely made a dent in the bottle. So worth it.

I’ll continue to use it and post a before/after picture of my hair once I finish the bottle.

So far I am impressed by the formulation of this product. It is very special. If you are searching for a serum that doesn't "wet" but at the same time will moisturize and hydrate your scalp, this is it. It is a very unique texture, I believe it mimics the chemical properties of sebum and I will probably be using this until further notice. I look forward to seeing the "density" claim. So far I have found that it makes my hair feel stronger.

body: For me this stuff is AMAZING. It has grown my hair some but what I really love about it is the natural volume it gives!!! I apply at night after my shower and let my hair air dry. When I wake up voila I have voluminous, thick looking hair at the base. It gives a fullness to the hair and doesn’t make my very long hair greasy. I’ve rebought over and over and it’s absolutely my HG. Not understanding the negative reviews. For me this was a game changer.

title: It works..... slowly.

I have very thin hair and not much of it, so the results were definitely visible, especially around the crown of my head. I took off one star as it does make your hair oily. That wasn't too much of an issue for me as I would apply it a few hours before I showered anyways, but it's good for potential buyers to be aware of that! I'll probably keep buying it as a $17 bottle lasts me two months.

This actually works! I've been recommending it to friends and family as I've seen amazing results in just a couple of weeks. I noticed a lot of hair loss on my hairline and started using this 2-3x a week, I have lots of new growth framing my face and my hair feels thicker.
Very disappointed in this product. I used it for about 3 months every night before bed and saw no changes in the gaps in my hairline.

title: try it
body: This stuff is amazing. I was experiencing very severe postpartum hair loss. It was horrifying. The other serums were so expensive and I figured they wouldn’t work anyway. When I saw this I was like whatever it’s not 100.00 who cares if it works or not. & omggg it actually does. Within 2 weeks I saw a difference. My hairline is more filled in now than it has been in years. I use it every night and sometimes if I don’t have anywhere to go I put it in my hair in the morning also.

title: It actually works!
body: I’m actually shocked that it works so well. I kinda thought it’d be a scam. I’m in the military so my hair was thinning especially my hairline from buns all the time. It’s only been a month and I’m impressed by the results already.

title: IT'S AMAZING!
body: Ive been using this serum for around 2 weeks now, this past year I have has micro link extensions in & i've had some hair thinning from them. Ive been using this serum I put it on my scalp only around one syringe full all over your scalp the key is to massage it for 10 minutes on your scalp, I found that when I really massaged it the next day my hair wasn't oily. I wash my hair around once a week so the buildup with this product at the end of the week does produce oiliness but its nothing dry shampoo cant fix (depending on how oily your hair naturally is.) I have seen major regrowth already my baby hairs are growing my hairline is looking more full. I do recommend this product. The results from 2 weeks are godly so I cant imagine after 3 months like the bottle recommends, I am super excited.

title: Not much help and adds to scalp build up
body: So I bought this 8 months ago and have been using it since. Since this works on a dry and clean scalp, applying it one after washing and drying hair was how I’ve been doing it (alternating everyday just to give my scalp a break in between). I don’t think I seen any hair growth but actually a bit more hair loss since using it, however the hair loss is not very consistent, but I do notice a bit of build up on my scalp some days. The formula is a very light and doesn’t irritate the scalp’s skin however. At the end of the day, I can’t even evaluate if this is meant to strengthen the scalp to keep the hair fociles in, or to strengthen the hair root from falling out itself. If you are struggling with hair loss, it might be better to make smaller positive lifestyle choices slowly as sudden stress and exercise can make your hair loss work than rely solely on this.
Works great, it helped me with hair loss. Doesn't make hair greasy or oily, and once it dries no one can see it. Good value for money.

title: didn’t do anything

title: It's been a month so far..

I went into trying this product with little expectations, but it worked remarkably well. Just not for the reason I got it. I have thick curly hair and a rather dry scalp, I shed hair like crazy and have a lot I have to manage. Trying this product, I was hoping it would help reduce my hair shedding as heavily, instead it actually helped my scalp the most. I was having so many issues with dander and dry spots and this stuff helped sooth those problems and made my hair feel silkier. I always put it in at night and by morning the greasiness others experienced were non existent for me. I definitely recommend it, less is more and make sure to message it in for a couple minutes.

I expected little to no outcome from this product, to be completely transparent. I already take Hum vitamins and it wasn't addressing the receding hairline issue. First picture is before and the second is my month in progress. This stuff is A-M-A-Z-I-N-G! I have no complaints! Yes, it's mild greasy but it's not a deal breaker to me. I have skipped a few days but all in all use it a 2x about 5 days a week in problems spots. Also, I am generous with the serum/dropper and still have more than half a bottle left.
Did nothing for me, nothing for my husband. Absolutely no improvement... wouldn't recommend

I could see hair growth as soon as the next week. I used for a few bald spots and baby hairs started popping up. Still use to this day once every other week and have great shiny, healthy hair!

title: works wonders!

title: Alopecia Saviour

title: magic potion!!

This serum has helped reverse most of the balding and has provided new growth and overall gave me back my confidence to put my hair up. It is a slow process but using this and castor oil has improved significantly over 2 years.

I use it at night on my scalp with dry hair before I go to sleep and wake up with PERFECT hair in the morning. It has completely replaced the need for dry shampoo. My hair is thicker, fuller, more voluminous, not too oily or too dry. The texture is super soft and healthy. I’m obsessed. I can go 3-4 days between washes with styling and everything. Seriously it’s amazing.

title: This DEFINITELY works
body: You probably just want to know if this works or not, and I will tell you it DOES. When I use this regularly I eventually notice a ton of new baby hairs. I had some hair loss associated with a medication I was taking and I had thin hair to begin with, and this product made a visible difference. Really massage it into your scalp before bed to stimulate the hair growth too. I'm convinced it's the combination of this product and the scalp massage that's making it work. It wasn't as affective when I was just dropping the serum on my scalp and rubbing it in a bit - really get in there and massage your whole scalp. On my 3rd bottle. Maybe 4th? I lost track. Literally the only drawback is the ton of annoying baby hairs you will get from this or any growth serum, but they are a VERY welcome nuisance, it means it's working! I am currently at the point where I have bangs made of baby hair and my ponytails look so stupid. It's a wonderful sign

title: Love love
body: Love this. It's been 3 weeks and now I'm seeing amazing results. Remember to massage it into the scalp really well and I love that it's not oily.

title: I Actually Miss It

I noticed a difference in how much hair my brush would pick up, so I'm impressed. I would run this through my roots and massage it into my scalp, then brush it through. Pretty straightforward.

title: It works
body: I have been using it for the past 2 weeks and I started seeing differences in my hair growth and not falling as much as it used to be

title: please don’t stop making this!
body: I hope they never stop making this stuff. I’ve been on a hair journey this pandemic—my hair started falling out from a combination of stress and me being dumb and using harsh shampoos. I started really paying attention to my scalp, which was itchy and dry. I switched to Sulphate free, ph balanced shampoo, for sensitive skin, and started using this at night. It really helped soothe my scalp. I am experiencing a lot of regrowth, but I’m not sure it’s from this as I made a lot of lifestyle changes as well, but it keeps my scalp happy and itch free and it’s certainly not hurting my hair, so it’s a win. I have crazy sensitive skin (If getting contact dermatitis we’re a job, I’d be killing it), so I hold on to things that don’t cause a reaction. I’m on my third bottle and will keep purchasing forever.

I bought this product hoping it would fill in the spots in my hairline that are thin but it did nothing, I used the entire bottle on the same spots each night and noticed no difference in my hair whatsoever

title: Fast shocking hair growth
body: My favourite product. It works! Would purchase again.

title: I think it works!
body: Very seldom does a product shock me and/or out preform my expectations. This did. I felt like my hair which is fine and curly but I have a lot of it started to look thinner in front. 2020 caused all kinds of stress. I had tried Aveda's Invanti, nothing. Halfway though my first bottle of this peptide serum and I have so many baby hairs they make bangs. I know that brand can't tell you that you hair will grow. Mine did fast and now ordered two more bottles. I use it differently than as instructed on the bottle otherwise you would run out of the whole bottle and one use and have seen nothing but great success and results.

title: It (sort of) worked for me!
body: Used the whole bottle and definitely see results Must use every night and massage into hair. Also used moon juice vitamins to help

I have never-coloured, fine hair and I used to have a lot of it. A medication I started taking caused it to start to thin and look dry and damaged, so I've been searching for products to help ever since. This product says to use it every night, which is just not possible for my hair type because it looks greasy the next morning. So I only use it 3 times a week, the night before showering. It didn't seem to make my hair look thicker or fuller, so I used up the first bottle and walked away. But then I noticed that my hair didn't seem as smooth or healthy a few weeks later. So I repurchased it and started using it again and my hair is back to the way it was. While it definitely didn't help with thickening my hair, the hair I do still have on my head looks healthier, and that's definitely worth it to me. Everyone is different but the upside to this product is that for the price, you aren't committing a lot of money to see if it works for you too.

This product is great and it really does work! I used it in a targeted area and I had a ton of new hair growth. It is a bit hard to control where the product itself goes because it is a liquid. It also does not make your hair oily when you put it on so if I did use it in the morning, you could not tell I had it on during the day. The only issue I have now is that the new hair is obviously shorter than the rest of my hair.

i was skeptical about this product and gave it a try. I didn't notice anything for the first month but I kept using it and now I have so much regrowth it's amazing. A little goes a long way and I like the fact it doesn't make my hair oily.

title: Perfect for Postpartum Hairloss

I used this about 3-5 times over the last three months (more than three drops per use) and noticed a lot of baby hair growing where I massaged the product in my scalp. Product is a little greasy but not heavy greasy. Overall, I would repurchase.

title: PATIENCE & CONSISTENCY ARE KEY
body: I have thick hair in the first place, and started using this when my hair started to thin and fall out more after sun and bleach damage. I think it works! My hair is definitely falling out less and is starting to feel thicker again.

title: Thicker hair.
body: I have noticed the difference using The Ordinary. I’ve been using it since January and my hair feels fuller, and it doesn’t shed off as much. Doesn’t feel oily at all.
Made my scalp itchy. Couldn't use it more than once because the itchiness was unbearable.

I used this overnight every other night and saw results after a few weeks! My hair is so much fuller and more voluminous now. For best results, massage into scalp for a few minutes after application and don't forget to wash pillow case frequently!

I've used this for a while now, and I'm noticing thicker, softer hair. I've had hairloss from chemo, and I wanted something like this to help fix my hair thinning out. at first I was skeptical of using oil on my thin flat hair, that it would be an oil greasy mess. the oil is quick drying within a few minutes. average about 10. scalp massages are great. I place it directly on the scalp and let it work its way through before massaging with my fingers. make sure to tilt your head back or front depending where you apply it, or it'll run down your face or neck. it doesn't hurt color treated hair. there's no build up. I use it as directed at night. so far I'm loving it.

title: HOLY GRAIL
body: I got this because my hair line is literally destroyed from the side part and the bottom of my hair has so much breakage that i can’t even wear my hair up without product. I also realized that, why would i spend $80 separately for a lash and then a brow serum when I could just test the versatility for such an efficient cost and WOW! I ruined my lashes from glue and scrubbing but I apply some on my finger and rub it in then rub it through my eyebrows and eyelashes (lid) day and night and ITS ONLY BEEN A WEEK and i can ALREADY see some growing longer!!! I am super excited to see a month down, ALSO DO NOT TRY TO APPLY THE SERUM ON YOUR LASHLONE WITH A SPOOLY, my eyes did not like that very much haha. I wish it was a little bigger, using it for so many things.

title: Not effective

title: didn't work
body: I was so skeptical at first because here are like an infinite number of products out there that claim they make hair grow. I’ve tried everything from supplements to topical rogaine products etc. and this is literally the ONLY thing that has ever shown results, and in under a month I might add. I bought this because I had a widows peak that is genetic and it’s make me self conscious my whole life. And this actually made hair start growing, I started seeing results after two weeks of using it, keep in mind I had been skipping nights because I’d forget to do it again very night, and I still got results! Also, I have half a bottle to my friend to use because half her eyebrow was missing (I forget why), and it’s growing back!! Almost a full eyebrow now and it’s been only 3 weeks. She’s really happy about it cause she doesn’t have to draw hers on anymore.

body: Takes a while for you to notice results & make sure you use it consistently (I massage some onto my scalp & hairline every other day or so, but not on wash days). Unfortunately, I don't see any results even after 3 months. Other method of directly applying serum to the scalp makes my hair greasy, no matter how little the quantity is. FYI, I have always have fine hair, they are thinning from the front now. And I really want to know how do you guys use it. Thanks in advance :)

title: love this product
body: Love this product! Non oily, I use it on clean hair before bed. Has kept my hair from being dry the next day after use. Personally I recommend it!

title: Worse not better
body: First, this is literally my first ever review on sephora because I think everyone should be aware of this product. I would honestly leave this product zero stars if they would let you. I would be willing to bet on here five star reviews are sponsored or gifted there is NO WAY. I will say, I love all ordinary products so I am shocked about how bad this is. I was losing my hair PP and was desperate to find anything to help. I think this actually made it worse, not only did I see zero change after one month of consistent (every other day) it made my hair heavy, greasy and gave me dandruff that was downright disgusting. I added a picture because I think women who are really stressed and upset that their hair is falling out, don’t need their head now suddenly covered in skin patches. It reached the point where it was genuinely embarrassing. I had hoped it would be at least worth it to see patches fill in, but it never happened. Reading more reviews now, I saw that a lot of women got migraines I didn’t realize where they were coming from but I also had headaches starting with this serum which really concerns me because I don’t know why that would occur. Either way, never ever would I buy this product again.

title: Not really sure it is working
body: I really wanted to love this but it left my hair greasy. I didn’t like that at all.

I have bought 3 bottles of this stuff. I can't really tell if it's working but I am afraid to stop using it. My hair is super fine and while I'm not exactly balding, there are spots that I wish had more hair growth. I haven't seen any difference in that, the thinner spots still look thin. However, my hair has gotten long and there seems to be less fall out in the shower. The length is probably due to not seeing my stylist since the start of covid.
This product is amazing. It helped me in hair growth along with good volume in my hair. It’s watery consistency is helpful in everyday usage. It could said one solution to all hair problems.

I applied to my hairline above my forehead to help achieve a fuller look. After a few weeks I noticed it was looking thinner and I could see more patches. I stopped using a supplement and equated it to that. But my friend mentioned her hair was also looking thinner and realized this was the cause! It didn’t make my hair greasy though but unfortunately thinned it!

title: Love It!
body: I bought this because some reviews said it helps with dry and flakey scalp and those reviews were definitely true! I have 4a hair and my scalp gets dry especially when the weather changes, this really helped me with that, no more flaking! I reduced a star because it’s very runny and I feel like I have to use a lot more than a few drops. I haven’t been using it long enough for me to see results in terms of thickening but I can say that there are a lot of new baby hairs popping up on my edges and the back of my head. This has replaced my usual scalp oil and definitely a new staple in my hair care routine!!

title: Doesn't deliver results
body: I swear this made my hair worse! Thought I would try it since it's cheaper than Rogaine. I made an appointment with the dermatologist I think I have scalp Alpocia. Wouldn't recommend this product, it didn't deliver for me. After you put it in at night you have to wash ur hair the next day or your hair looks greasy.

title: new hair growth!
body: I don't know how, but it actually works! The directions say to use on clean, dry hair, which leaves out everyone with curly hair (if you're a curly you know what I'm talking about) but I apply this when my hair is wet just before applying product, and also at night while my hair is dry but already has a lot of product in it. title: Great for hair shedding prevention
body: Love this product! Have suffered from stress related hair loss for over 5 years. My stylist says she already sees new growth since i began using this product

I’m on my second bottle and all I can say is this stuff is amazing. A few months ago I was starting to experience a crazy amount of hair shedding from work stress. I freaked out at the amount of hair that I seemed the be shedding every time I brushed my hair or showered. After about 1 week of using this serum, my hair almost immediately stopped shedding and I am noticing baby hairs growing in along my hairline. I will say that you should be consistent and patient if you want to see results. It will definitely take more than one bottle to see hair growth results. My only feedback, which others have mentioned is that it’s easy to go through a bottle pretty quick if you are using it daily. One bottle lasted me about 4 weeks.

title: HOLY GRAIL

title: TRY IT! I can not say enough wonderful things!
body: I would like to thank the reviewers both kind & brave enough to put up pictures of their before & after. It is because of them that I was willing to spend the money to try this product. I never write reviews but because the product worked so well, I felt obligated to. The beauty industry has ingrained that beautiful hair is tied to femininity for women & youth/virility for men. For over a year, I have had every type of stressor in my life, personal/professional, death of a parent & along with everyone else the general 2020/21 all encompassing COVID stress. My hair, which is fine anyway, started to thin, get sparse & rapidly gray. I also noticed my hair was coming out more with regular styling & brushing. (With COVID lockdowns, I was continuing to touch my gray roots up, once a month, but from home, with professional Wella color.) In January 2021, I made a vow to start doing small acts of self-care daily. I then started taking biotin which I did notice helped greatly making my hair stronger & greatly reduced the fall out. I was still not completely happy. I felt my hair was still thin & sparse. In April, I began using my first bottle of " The Ordinary Multi-Peptide Serum for Hair Density" & it lasted me about 1.5 months. I saw noticeable results after about a month & I am hooked. I noticed other people voiced complaints of it making their hair oily. My best advice put it on a clean scalp, in the early evening, a day or so after washing hair. For volume, the next day I pass the blow dryer over it with a bit of dry shampoo to absorb any on the hair shaft as it really needs to be absorbed by the scalp. I only wash my hair once a week as I have over years "trained my hair" and otherwise can not find time or energy too (I am a RN). The difference in my new-hair/ re-growth is night &day. I get compliments on my hair all the time now. I recommend I really can't say enough great things about it. I encourage people to be patient, give it time and to try it for themselves.

title: doesn't fit my lifestyle- back it went.
body: I'm giving this product a 3 bc I couldn't stick it out long enough to see results. I went through the grueling training phase of my hair so I only wash it twice a week, which has helped a lot in terms of hair density and overall health in my opiniom. This stuff requires you to put it on clean hair, and you need to wash it out the next morning bc this stuff is the definition of grease factory. Unless you're cool with washing your hair twice a day, I'd look into another option.

title: Who cares about Vegamor when there's this???
body: My first review on sephora page because you all need to know how awesome this product is! I may have been starting to bald? So I began to use this product on the widows peak kinda area of my forehead and baby hairs are growing back! Seriously! One bottle lasted me three months just using it on those two spots. I'm going to start using this on my whole head though so I do know it will go faster then. OMG get this!

title: Effective product, but please continue reading
body: Works effectively and that’s the most important thing. However there are some minor points to take into consideration: 1. Beware of hair growth on other parts of your body. I can tell my arm hair and facial hair have grown a lot faster since I used this product. 2. Don’t put the serum on right before you go to bed because if it gets on your face and you have sensitive skin, you would probably break out like me. Instead, put it on like an hour or so before bed to let your hair absorb the product. And remember to wash your hands after.

title: consistency is key!
body: I’ve been using it for a few weeks hoping to volumize my hair a bit. Haven’t seen a difference in terms of volume- and I honestly wouldn’t realistically except to see a difference just yet. The issue? I’d apply the product the same night as I’d wash my hair (application done after hair is fully dried), then the next morning I’d wake up and my hair smells like it hadn’t been washed for a week. Idk why but that’s really unpleasant.

I have post-partum hair loss and my hair would fall out in clumps! I've only been using this product for about 5 weeks and have noticed a significant change. My daily hair loss has gone down by almost half and in the past week alone I've noticed so much baby hair growing in my bald spots. I did not have this kind of hair growth with my first child.

So I truly believe there are inconsistencies in this product. I don’t know much about it, could be a batch issue. The last 2-3x I purchased this was no different than water. I took pictures everyday for up to 6 months and there was no difference at all. When focusing on the ingredients it seems like the mother of all scalp serums but for some reason it just doesn’t deliver. But if the ingredients they claim to have used come to work (I love studying chemistry so know a bit about it) then this would dominate the whole industry.
You definitely have to give this one time and use it consistently to see results! I have used it for a few weeks now and have little baby hairs growing where I applied it!
I love this serum! I makes your hair a little greasy when you use it at night but by morning it’s gone. I’ve seen a big difference!

It seems like you’d need to get it all over to work, but it’s hard to do that before it dries and if I apply directly to my head, I find my hair gets too oily. title: Great Serum
body: This product will NOT make your hair grow overnight or in a few weeks. That’s simply unrealistic— no product will do that. However, this product does work. I have been using it for a few months now and I’ve noticed my baby hairs are finally growing out and I could not be happier! I have not noticed any hair density changes other than that, but it might just be hard to tell for me. This serum is also great for some short term volume as it strengthens strands and seems to give my hair a boost the next time. It will definitely appear denser right away. Be sure to use only a few drops! You do not need to slather your whole head in this serum. I have medium thickness hair and I would say I probably use half or a little less than whole dropper full of serum all over my head. Simply part your hair to reach the scalp, apply a few drops along the part, and give your scalp a nice massage until it’s absorbed. I usually do it for about 5-10 minutes. Overall, this product is one of the cheapest on the market for hair density and works well in my opinion! Good luck if you try it!

title: Grew my hairline back!
body: I’m actually surprised from the results. My hair is very fine and I noticed some thinning around my crown (probably from wearing a tight bun daily). I use this on the nights where I am going to wash my hair the next day. The results came quicker than I expected. My hair looks denser around my crown and I have less dandruff. I only wash my hair every third day but it seems like this is controlling oil production and that may be why my hair looks more full. It’s pretty cheap so I’d recommend anyone to try it.

title: Seeing Great Results so Far
body: Amazing. My 4 month results (using every day even on unwashed hair). First photo was me 3 months postpartum and second photo was taken this month!

I’ve been losing my hair around the crown due to hypothyroidism and birth control for the past 12 years. I’ve tried different treatments and topicals over the time. My scalp was looking quite bad last year. I bought The Ordinary Serum in February 2021, and two months later I’m seeing a difference. My sides look fuller, and the top is importing as well. I don’t have to use as much hair/ scalp powder to cover the bald spots like before. Of course, results may vary from person to person— I’ve personally been using the topical only after washing my hair, so I’m pretty happy with the results so far.

Used in moderation it works, too many drops will make you look greasy but using just a couple drops on the front and back you can feel it working through your scalp and giving the feeling of a hair texturizer. but it has filled my hair line, it actually works!

title: Definitely works!
body: Didn’t see any difference Didn’t help with my itchy scalp

Definitely works! I used to pluck my hair out (especially around my baby hairs) bc of stress and it was difficult to grow them back. However, after a few months of using it, I can definitely see improvements. But I haven’t been using them consistently, I would’ve gotten better results in that time. The liquid is not too oily but beware of putting too much or it makes your hair oily faster. It’s like watery consistency and dries up quickly. It’s very affordable and worth the results. I suggest to take pictures while using it bc seeing the difference will amaze you.

Might seem a bit soon to write a review after 2 weeks of use, but I think I have something relevant to say for those who might be considering using this. I have fine, curly hair, and a scalp that doesn’t tend to get oily too quickly; however, after daily usage of this product (at night as the bottle suggests) I’ve found it does leave my scalp noticeably oily. Running my hands through my hair in the morning leaves a slick substance on my fingertips. That said, since using I have noticed decreased shedding and overall healthier appearance of the hairline. It’s also mitigated some issues with dry scalp that I had. So, in short, it seems to be working, but at the cost of an oily scalp, which I find is increasing the frequency of my wash days—something maybe beneficial to my now oily scalp but not too great for the lengths of my hair. I also worry if the benefits are temporary, an oil scalp means follicles that can’t breathe all too well, as far as I know, which is bad for natural hair growth. I’ll continue use and update if any of these issues reside.

This product is really watery, so if you dont massage the are you put the serum, depending on hair porosity, the serum will mostly be absorbed by your hair. I remembered reading reviews that mentioned a similar issue and decided to stop using it for a week to see what happens. Sure enough, the pimples have gone away. I bought this hoping it might help with some of the thinning and have used half a bottle so far with no discernible results. I do like the fact that there is no smell and that it’s a leave in serum, but that’s about it. No sure if I’ll repurchase, I might try to Keratase one next and just swallow the price tag.

title: AMAZED - New Growth within a week!
body: THIS STUFF WORKS WITHIN A WEEK! It's non irritating and simple to use! Just a few drops onto a dry scalp ( don't dulute) and Wowsie, off to a full head of hair, that was once getting the dreaded "wide part"!
