I put it on at night and yes it can look greasy but by morning it doesn’t and a little goes a long way!

So I've been dealing with thinning hair mainly in the hairline over the last 4 years since birth control completely messed with my hormones. Since then, I've tried all kinds of natural remedies and health changes but I've never actually tried a product that was specifically formulated to help with hair loss until I saw this in store and decided to give it a try. I love other Ordinary skincare products and with all the success I've had with them, plus the very affordable price tag, I decided to give this one a shot too. I've only been using it for 2 weeks now, but in the first week I actually noticed new hair growth along my hairline!! I never review stuff but I think this needs to be shared with anyone who could benefit from such an easily accessible solution to thinning hair! From what I've seen in the reviews, some people have had similar experiences to me and some it didn't work for at all, so I would say it all depends on the cause and severity of your thinning/hair loss. Mine wasn't super severe but I did have a lot of thinning in my temples to the point where I filled it in everyday with eyeshadow, but my guess is in a month I won't have to do that anymore! If you can afford to test it out, I highly recommend you give it a try. *Only giving 4 stars because I haven't been using it for a long period but I will give an update in a month!

title: Waste of money and time
body: I am on my second bottle. I am not sure if it is working, but I also was not consistent in using daily. Seems like it has helped with hair thickness. Would recommend

title: Dry scalp saviour
body: I used this product for a while and always on my forehead line but never noticed any hair growth. If you have dry scalp it will help you. But for hair growth it didn’t work for me at all

title: You notice a growth in a month!
body: I did not like this product at all. I would put this on before bed and concentrate it on where my hair was thinner. I would wake up and my head would be so itchy. Like I thought I had lice itchy. I had to use my scalp scrubber to get all residue off and if I didn’t, it still itched like crazy. I tried it again and left it on for a shorter amount of time but I was concerned if it would still work. It still itched like crazy. The serum is too runny and I haven’t seen any results. Will not repurchase.
I used it daily until i finished the bottle. It didn’t increase my hair density or length. My humble advice is to use minoxidil 5 percent as it is effective

I had extremely dry and flakes scalp. After only a couple uses it’s almost gone and even not using it for a week it’s maintained the balance of my scalp. I cannot say weather it helps with hair density yet because I haven’t been using it for long enough. Great for dry scalp though! Also did not give me an migraines like I’ve heard a few people say
This actually works! It does work pretty quickly but it won’t give you long luscious hair in a month. You just notice some difference in a month. It absorbs pretty well and non greasy feeling.

title: Greasy Beer in a Bottle
body: Helped my dry scalp tremendously!! I used this product to help rebuild the moisture barrier on my scalp. My only complaint is that I find it hard to apply sometimes, if it gets too far into your hair it makes it greasy looking. That being said, after longer use, I find overall my hair is less greasy.

title: YES, YES, YES, AMAZING!!!!!
body: Simply, it left my scalp and hair greasy and reeking like beer. I tried to tolerate it and use it anyway, at least every other nights where I planned to wash my hair in the morning, but the stench was too overwhelming. I can’t speak to its efficacy because I couldn’t finish the bottle. This purchase was a disappointment, because I adore all the other Deciem products I’ve tried.

YES, YES, YES, AMAZING! If you want healthier, longer, softer hair, then this is serum is FOR YOU! I'm only on my second bottle (about a month of use per bottle with near nightly application) and my hair looks fuller, healthier and legit longer. Beyond that it's easy to apply, easy to use, and really everything I hoped it wold be. Given how often I'm being asked if I got extensions, I would even go so far as to say that it is the equivalent to weave-in-a-bottle. Trust the hype, in this case it is real!
Disappointed... Used over a month no change. Hate the look and feel of scalp getting greasy applying this. For the price, its not a huge loss if it doesn't work.
Super good! Helped my hair grow tremendously within weeks. Just don’t put to much in your hair bc it can be a lil on the greasy side. Other than that, it worked!
I’ve been using this for 2 weeks or so now and I’ve already noticed such a difference in my hair volume and feeling of thickness. I’ve also been putting it on my eyebrows and they’re growing in well.

title: Do It
body: This product singlehandedly fixed my baby hair patch. The hair is growing for the first time in 20 years and its incredible. I also use this on my eyebrows and eyelashes so much so my lash, as well as my eyebrow lady has made a comment. I have been using this product every night since December and after almost four months I still have 1/3 of the bottle left. Superb value for the quantity and results. 10/10 would recommend!!

title: THIS IS GOLD. HOLY GRAIL PRODUCT
body: This works. Period. My hair is growing insanely fast and it’s growing in thicker. My hairstylist noticed a difference in my hair almost immediately. This little bottle is a miracle.

title: Worth a try, will be repurchasing
body: I’m almost done my first bottle, for context I’ve always dealt with hair loss due to stress. My hair is thin around the left side of my head and around the crown. I applied it about every night, or every other night, and it’s not greasy unless you used more than 2 full drops of the dropper in a certain area. I find that it helped sprout little baby hairs around the areas I applied it to, which didn’t help fully fill out my thinner areas as the hairs are still small, but it’s nice to know that eventually that hair will grow out and hopefully be a little more filled. I also found that it helped with shedding when I washed my hair, I usually end up with clumps in the shower but I barely had 2 strands leave my head. I still found shedding and breakage to be an issue with certain hair ties and my detangler brush, but it wasn’t as bad as it used to be. Plus, my family actually pointed out my hair was less susceptible to getting tangled and knotty lately. I’m buying another bottle to see how these little hair sprouts develop. I say it’s worth trying at least once if you’re intrigued. I took off 1 star because I find that I have to use quite a bit to cover all the areas I want to cover which leaves my hair a bit greasy and because you have to be consistent with it, so if you’re extremely lazy about consistently taking products or don’t have a night time routine this isn’t for you.

title: hydration? yes! ... hair growth? not yet
body: Started using this after experiencing hair loss from changing birth control (ugh) and after 1 bottle I can’t say it increased hair growth but it definitely HYDRATES my scalp which I didn’t even realize I needed. Re-ordering for the scalp hydration. However I only used like 1-2 times a week so I might not be the best review for the hair growth factor.

title: Love Love Love
body: I was pretty skeptical if this would work, but after using this serum for a few weeks, my hair is noticeably thicker. It feels fuller and healthier than before and has actually helped with oil control! I have fine hair and it would get oily quickly. Since using The Ordinary’s hair serum, I have been able to longer without washing it, which keeps my hair feeling healthier. 10/10 recommend!

I have been going through Alopecia since I was 13 years old. I am 30 now. Tried various things like Minoxidil, LED, Ayurveda. Thought I will try this as one. I have started seeing grey hairs after started using this. I thought it could be because I am hitting 30. But once I have stopped using this one my greys stopped ( Touchwood)

title: Quick Results
body: Bought it to see if it worked and I didn’t see any results tbh. My hair has fallen out over the years and this really didn’t do much in making it thicker or fuller.

title: fair chance
body: I am blown away by the fast results I’ve had using this once a night before bed time. I use it specifically on some spots by my hair line thinning, most likely from wearing my hair in a bun a lot, and I’ve already seen significant improvement in two weeks. I wake up and my scalp is more moisturized and stimulated where I applied it and there has been new growth and baby hairs coming in already. I also love how it’s not messy to apply and has no scent. It also didn’t stain my pillow cases.

title: A great addition to anyone’s hair care
body: I bought this initially in hopes of restoring my postpartum alopecia. It has helped a bit but not dramatically. I’ve only been using it for a little over a month. I have noticed less fallout, which I attribute to this and the Aloe Vera prepoo mask I use at every wash day (once a week). The real miracle is how this has grown my eyebrows. I have decent eyebrows but the tips are a bit thinned. I started using it on them after reading someone’s review. Boy, has it done miracles. I will for sure continue to use this on both my mane and brows. I took one star away because this product is for hair on your head not brows.

Headaches galore! noticed I was getting them when I applied this product. Noticed a few other people note the same. Product should come with a potential headache side effects warning. Not worth the headaches for me truthfully.

I’ve been using this product intermittently for the last month or so, I think it’s working? I haven’t noticed less fall out, but my hair doesn’t feel as thin. It could be in my head, but I’m enjoying the product and think that if I began using it more, I’d notice stronger results

I absolutely love this hair serum. I have really thick hair but I bought this to use as a preventative measure because I genuinely believe in The Ordinary products. It dries non-greasy and makes your hair feel great.

title: I swear this works?!
body: I swear this works?!? My hair is definitely a little longer than before and feels much better. I died my hair with box dye before I started using this. Two weeks later I see about a half inch of gray hair growing from my root. It’s definitely speeding up the process!!!

title: Just purchased me second bottle
body: Just finished my first bottle and purchased another. It lasted a month but I will be using it more sparingly the second time around as I've read a little goes a long way! I use it after I shower and before bed. It's isn't oily/greasy and I'm hoping for noticeable results after using up my second bottle!

title: helped my hair grow longer but not thicker
body: I just finished the whole bottle and I can’t say I noticed an increase in the density of my hair. I will say that my hair grew lots while using and I had a lot of people comment on that. My hair is thin so I found I had to use some dry shampoo the following morning after using the treatment since there was a slight residue. For the price I feel it was worth a try.

title: Greasy and Smelly
body: not sure about hair density, but it really helped with scalp dryness.

title: Be patient and this works
body: This product is greasy and smelly. I wouldn’t recommend to anyone. If not for the COVID situation I would definitely return it.

You have to be consistent and patient for this to work. You won't see results in a week or two because hair takes longer than that to grow. I have been using this once a day on my eyebrows and hairline for over a year and have seen a lot of improvement. After years of over plucking, my eyebrows have fully grown in and I have no bare spots. Luckily, the bottle lasts for so long.

title: PATIENCE
body: Don’t know if this is helping yet but it’s easy to use and non greasy. I bought a second bottle to give it more time.

So far i have high hopes for this serum. I like the texture of it and that it does not make my hair oily/greasy. No negative reactions orI anything so far. ’m really hoping to see some great results after using it for awhile

Ningún serum es mágico, tienes que ser constante para que de los resultados. Yo voy por el segundo botecito y cada vez veo como los hoyitos de mi cabeza se van llenado y me va creciendo nuevo cabello.
i had long hair.. down to my bum and lost half the length rocking a high ponytail for the whole summer... this is really helping growing back. + i see the baby hairs growing its amazing

This stuff is amazing. Be patient! It took about 2-3 months of usage to start seeing baby hairs, the biggest difference personally was the thickness of the strands, the strands of hair aren’t as fine anymore I think this is more for thickening the strands rather then new growth! I recommend Castor oil if you want new hair growth although this oil isn’t as greasy on the hair as castor oil

I’ve been using this product for almost 2 months now and have been noticing results for about 1 month. I put this product almost daily on the front my hairline where I have mostly baby hairs and have noticed increased hair growth in that area. I am going to try it out on the rest of my head as I have pretty fine hair, and hopefully will start to see results. The serum does take a while to work, but that is to be expected. My main gripe is that it can look oily in the hair.

title: took forever but it worked
body: Be patient! It took me over a month and a half to start growing new baby hairs. The product did give me a bit of dandruff tho, but it’s worth it for new hairs. I’m about to purchase my 2nd bottle

title: Soft shiny hair
body: I just finished my first bottle. My hair is just as thin as before, but it makes it shiny, manageable and less prone to frizz. I will continue to use it if only for the conditioning effect, even if it doesn’t give me thicker hair

title: Need better help than this
body: I have only been using this for a month. I am in my 60’s and have thinning, straight hair. It leaves a residue in my hair which feels gross and makes my hair look ugly. I am only using a drop per ‘area’ on my scalp.

title: Scalp relief!!! recommend to scalp issues!!
body: GREAT FOR SCALP ISSUES!!! I recently have been struggling with itchy scalp, possibly because of dryness and have had a bit of dandruff. I’ve been looking for a scalp oil/serum to help with this issue but everything is so thick and oily that they make my hair oily immediately after using it. This serum has literally changed my life! I apply it every night on my scalp and massage it in and wake up with a non itchy scalp and no extra oil! For the hair growth properties im not positive if it’s made a huge change but I am seeing some baby hairs under my bangs that weren’t there before. I will be repurchasing! Please never discontinue this product!!! (results listed above are from my 1st bottle) GET THIS IF YOU ARE HAVING ANY ITCHY/DRY/DANDRUFF ISSUES! it doesn’t matter if you want the growth or not this product is amazing

title: not much of a difference
body: Just finished my first bottle. I used this every other night and haven’t noticed much of a difference to be completely honest. It’s worth a shot since it’s cheap, but it is not life changing. Won’t repurchase

I’m a chronic ponytail wearer, that combined with life stress means my hair has been thinning in spots where it’s pulled back. I’ve been using this for a few weeks now and I have noticed my hair line is growing new hair! Now granted, I look crazy because I know have a million baby hairs but I’ll take baby hairs any day! Very happy with the results so far.

title: Can’t replace Rogaine *sigh*
body: Been suffering from female hair loss for years and was instructed to use 5% Rogaine from my dermatologist, which I had done so for years as well which seemed to keep my hair loss from getting worse ie. maintaining my current hair growth. Decided to switch over to this serum which is MUCH cheaper than Rogaine, also much easier to rub into your scalp since you don’t need to deal with foam that you have to disperse in your roots. I like the ease of using this, it doesn’t make my scalp oily and it’s priced well. But for me I can’t tell if it made an impact at all - I can say it didn’t make my hair grow thicker, and it didn’t seem to be effective as Rogaine since it seems the rate of hair loss got a bit worse, not the same. So back to Rogaine I go.

title: No results
body: It's good so far. I think I need to use 8t for a bit longer before assuming that it helps to grow my hair

title: great for hair line! but not so great for eyelash
body: I used this product for six weeks and saw absolutely no results. I would not recommend this product as it is a complete waste of money

title: Great for excessive fallout
body: Not that this product is bad or anything, in fact I’ve been using it for 2 months and I’ve seen a difference in my hair line but every time I’ve been using it for my eye lashes I’ve been seeing growth but also a-lot more fall out and even when i gently take off my eye makeup, i still get like 5+ lashes that fall out. Ive heard that this product was good for eyelashes and brows But its a shame because Ive been wanting to grow out my lashes and this has been doing more of the opposite and i don’t know what I’m doing wrong :( hopefully that was somewhat helpful for anyone that plans on buying this and for anyone thats experiencing the same thing.

title: LIFE SAVER
body: I’ve been having massive fallout due to stress (thanks covid) and would end up with an entire fistful of hair after each shower. I started using this less than a week ago and last night I realized that I only lost a few strands. Even after combing my hair, I lost less than a quarter of what was regularly falling off my head before I started using this. It’s too early for regrowth to be noticeable, but it seems like this stuff will keep my hair where it belongs, so it’s worth it to me! Using it before bed allows it to absorb well, so I’m not noticing any greasiness upon waking. I’ll definitely be sticking with it and rebuying when I run out.
I had very thin hair, receding hairline. This product saved my life. I love it so much, I’ve been using this this product for 3 months and my hair has grown so much. 12/10 you need this product.

title: lifesaver
body: I strongly recommend this serious trust me this is a little miracle in a bottle and I just ordered more bottles cos I am afraid to run out. I have had my edges all chopped for so many years and I just came across this serum decided to give it a try, I just used half of the bottle and I can see fuller and thicker edges coming out plus my baby hair are getting so much and curly.... this is a must have can’t live without it literally

title: Grow AND Soothe
body: I’ve only been using this product for a few weeks and a lot of the bald spots that I have are growing back.
Works, takes time so be patient. Worth the money, smells interesting, don’t use to much, massage in
Love this product! I noticed a difference in my hair in a few weeks and with using it everyday even other people have said they see a difference in the missing hair that has grown back.
Works well if you apply everyday. my hair fell of like crazy when I forgot to use for a few days >< I did see mew baby hair grew but did not improve the thinning areas

Has totally healed my itchy, flaky, scabby scalp - I started to pick due to anxiety and now there is nothing to pick (ha, gross sorry!) but totally healed. I also got this in a panic bc I thought I was giving myself bald spots, and the baby hairs lol!!! Looking a little crazy but it’s worth it. Nothing a little product can’t fix.

title: life saver
body: One month in and it looks like it is helping slightly. It’s been a month keeping in mind I’m just starting to see a difference now so will have to repurchase but worth a shot! I bought this for thinning hair and my part looks fuller now!

title: 1st Use
body: It seriously works!! I’ve only been using it for 2-3 weeks and look at the difference! I’ve been so insecure about how my hair line thins out on the one side and it is already so much thicker and less noticeable. Can’t wait to see the results as I continue to use it!

title: Love this! 4type hair
body: Overall great product!! I have medium to thick hair. Due to large amounts of stress, my hair began to fall out and loose its thick, soft texture. After just one week of applying this before bed every night, my hair has never looked healthier and fuller.
After using this product for about a month I’ve noticed less fallout when washing my hair and brushing it .. I also see some baby hairs coming in def gunna keep using this product
Just tried it for the first time and it's greasy in my opinion (I have fine curly hair). I'll keep using it and update this review in 3 months.

I love this product! After, you know, being skeptical for much of 2020. About a year and a half ago, a "master stylist" decided to put chemicals in my hair without my consent instead of just doing a protein treatment, flat ironing, and trimming it as discussed. Fast forward a few days and my beautiful 4 type hair was falling out in huge clumps. I eventually cut it down to an inch and got extensions. My scalp also appeared to be damaged and overall hair growth slowed. I purchased this product in 2020 and I didn't notice much of a difference after maybe a month of inconsistent use so I stopped using it. I came across the bottle a few weeks ago and thought, 'What the heck? Just finish the little bit that is left.' I've been using it every other night for about three weeks and my hair appears thicker. I very rarely use heat on my hair so I don't care about this being water based or my hair reverting to it's natural state. I think it really does work!

title: Wow!
body: En amour avec ce serum pour cheveux! Ne me laisse pas les cheveux gras, seulement brillant, volumineux et en santé. Je vois déjà une différence visible après 1 semaine d’utilisation. J’ai les cheveux fin, plat et très long. Je n’ai pas beaucoup de cheveux et je trouvais que j’en perdais beaucoup. Depuis j’en perds moin! Je vais devoir l’acheter à vie..!

title: Must Buy
body: Highly recommend this serum! Not oily, dries just like water. Use a few drops around hair line and make sure you massage into scalp. Hair seems stronger already but I will continue using and see if results are even better over time :) Ps- Read a review that said it caused pimples when it accidentally dripped onto face.. was not the case for me but I also am very careful with application so that it doesn't drip onto my face.

title: Causes flat ironed hair to revert
body: Begins to work after 84 days. Won’t see noticeable results until after 6 months of DAILY USE. Try it for a year. Otherwise the reviews are irrelevant. No, it’s not like regaine where you’ll lose the hairs once the growth begins. Major downfall- if you are of African decent and have naturally curly textured kinky hair and it’s flat ironed- this will cause roots and hair to revert.

title: CAUSES PIMPLES
body: made my hair thicker and grow faster, had lots of baby hairs coming in during the first few weeks of use!

title: Worth it!
body: When used this dripped down my face, over 3 times used over the span of 3 weeks, noticed I randomly was getting acne all over my forehead were it was dripping from!!!!!!!!!!!!! Unknown if it worked on my hair but after such a bad breakout of pimples witch I never get, idk if I will continue to use it.... to risky
Noticed lots of baby hairs and regrowth after using this almost every night for 3 weeks! definitely worth a try if you’re worried about hair thinning

title: Not gonna give tiktok results
body: 10 days in and what a difference! A major change in how much hair I’m shedding in a day. My scalp feel less dry and flaky. I’m also actively trying hairstyles that aren’t so harsh on my hair. It works both mentally and physically to make your hair thicker and fuller.

title: THIS IS MAGIC!
body: Saw a few viral videos on tiktok where girls use this and in 8 days their whole hairline is restored. Now could it be bc these girls were probably 16-18? Perhaps. Genetics? Maybe. But I finished the bottle and didn’t see any drastic results. Some background: I’m 24 and my hair up until last year to go past my butt when it was in a super high pony tail. I was recently diagnosed with pernicious anemia and since last year my hair started falling drastically. I chopped it ear length (quarantining still so why not?) and am starting from scratch. I have one large patch by my widows peak and a few scarce areas in the front of my hairline and after using this bottle no changes yet. Also it made my scalp very itchy and sticky which can affect your styling if you have wavy/curly hair.

title: Works with Patience
body: I’m suffering from really bad postpartum hair loss and suddenly have these two horrible bald spots and a receding hairline that has been making me feel so self conscious. Out of pure desperation I ordered this serum, thinking that maybe it might help in a month or two. Well I’ve been using it daily for a week and thought I’d snap a pic to see if there is any difference and I am BLOWN AWAY. See pic for these crazy results. Again, only one week!! I can’t speak to hair density yet, but I am already seeing significant regrowth and can’t wait to report back after a few more weeks!

title: Would Try!
body: I’ve been using this product for just over a month and have seen results. I use an entire dropper full across my scalp before bedtime, then flip my head over and really work the product into my scalp for about 2-3 minutes. By the time I wake up in the morning, the product has completely absorbed and I don’t find that my hair is any more oily than usual. If you have thinner hair I would recommend sticking to the recommended amount on the bottle. I’ve noticed a SIGNIFICANT decrease in hair loss, especially when I’m working conditioner through my hair in the shower which leads me to believe that over time this product will help with hair density overall. I’ve noticed this already in my part as it appears to be fuller. I also believe this product helps with keeping my scalp moisturized. Overall, if you’re willing to be consistent with this product it definitely works!

title: This product does wonders!! 100% recommend!!
body: I’ve been using this product on and off for a handful of weeks, and I can notice a difference! I have a nervous habit of pulling on my hair, which makes a lot of it fall out from time to time. This product totally gave me a ton of new baby hairs!! But, it might not be for everyone, and may have just worked well for me! I also use a lot of other oils and sprays on my hair for moisture

This product does wonders! I started using this serum consistently everyday about a month ago and I’ve noticed a huge difference in my hair - you just have to remain consistent with it .. trust me it works! I’m starting to notice so many new baby hairs near my temples. I would 100% recommend this product to anyone with hair loss issues! I’m almost done my first bottle and just ordered my second! A must buy for sure.

title: Get it !! PERIOD Dandruff is gone !
body: Absorbs in my scalp fast without the oiliness, you could nearly see the middle line of hairs because of the thickness which is great! i also put it in my eyelashes I noticed it made them longer but would fall and grow new ones literally NEW baby eyelashes so i don’t recommend for eyelashes its only long for a short time.

title: For thickening & washing less frequently
body: I used this for about 2-3 weeks now, and honestly, I did see my hair grow out quicker. So I think this is a good product, the only minor problem I have is that it kind of makes my hair look more oily.

title: ethnic girls read this
body: I got this product because I ended up chopping all of my hair off during the pandemic (my roots looked horrible). So I got this to help my hair grow out thick and healthy, and it's working for me. And, if you're looking for something that might help you wash your hair less frequently, I also noticed that I don't have to wash my hair has frequently when I use it, so I am saving $ on shampoo and all that (but I also don't use any other leave in products for my hair with it).

title: Worth the price
body: I was skeptical about this product because well you never know with products claiming to help with “hair growth” but I honestly have noticed an improvement in my hairline and overall health. I use a scalp scrubber to help with applying it

theres no smell. im blk & thought this was a oil type of serum. its not. this is like water as far as consistency & makes a blk girl’s hair feel nappy as it would if rain got your hair wet. im still going to use because of the claims it makes as far as hair growth but idk about effictiveness yet so im giving it a middle of the road rating cause i just started using.
I’ve been wanting to grow my hair for the longest time now and I’m so happy they have a serum that’s affordable. Here’s after 3 weeks of daily use.

title: Blown Away
body: I honestly didn't know if this was going to do anything to my hair, and I was skeptical since the reviews seemed iffy. Let me start off by saying, this was not the only change I made to my haircare. I didn't add in any other products, but I did start washing my hair more often. I planned on writing a review for this, and after I compared my starting point to now, I knew it was time. I used to have a bald spot on my right temple, and there are now tons of baby hairs at that spot. I don't know if it's 100% because of this product, but I do know I will continue to purchase this from now on. I also notice less hair in the drain when I shower, and my hair seems healthier overall. I'm so happy I gave this a shot! (pics are of dirty hair btw, so hopefully you can see the effects this serum had!)

title: hair growth
body: I used to use Rogaine, but it gave me dandruff and itchy scalp . I tried The Ordinary & never look back ! It’s unscented, non greasy and most importantly this stuff works!! I’m on my 5th bottle? I lost count ..After having a baby, I had a small bald patch and my hairline receded. Now I notice hair growth on my bald patch and my baby hair on my forehead grown back! No dandruff/ itchy scalp! It’s my routine staple to apply it after I wash my hair! No frill packaging, which brings its price reasonable! Recommend this product!

title: Worked for my pp hair loss
body: I was having major pp hair loss, this was a great price point so I decided to give it a try. And it actually worked ! I have babies hairs coming in again and my fall out has become noticeably less (after entire bottle use and used as directed) Definitely recommend this product, I will be buying it again

title: Dandruff Treatment!!
body: So I got this because I have thin hair and I'm insecure about the natural part at the crown of my head. I applied this after I washed my hair (2-3 times a week) for about 3 months. I haven't noticed any difference in the thickness of my hair. I know I didn't follow instructions to apply this "every day on a clean scalp," but I just don't wash my hair everyday. HOWEVER, I can confirm the other reviews that have stated it helps with dandruff. I usually get dandruff on the second day after I wash. With this serum, I don't get dandruff till the third or fourth day. I still get oily roots, but at least I can pull off a slick ponytail without flakes ruining the look! I have retired all my other dandruff products because of this :)

title: Great but Breakouts
body: J’ai commencé à l’utiliser il y a 2 semaines et a date c’est super mes lèvres sont douce et le gout wow!

Definitely works for increasing my hair growth (noticed in a few weeks) I massaged into the temples of my hair line where I have thinner hair and I am starting to notice hair fill in. BUT this stuff makes me breakout in ways I never have before... forehead, back all the way down to my waste with big puss filled zits... I have not changed anything except adding this product to my daily routine. Given that I am not going out these days (covid), I think I’m willing to suffer the massive breakouts in exchange for establishing more hair growth....

title: Realistic expectations
body: This product definitely works but you have to be consistent with it!

title: thyroid hair loss
body: I love it ! Deff made my hair thicker and healthier and helped so much with my hair line !

title: happy i got it!!!
body: This product made my hair very greasy !! Wouldn’t recommend

This isn’t a miracle product, I wouldn’t say that this alone was the result of my hair growing back, but I do believe it supported my new hair growth. I underwent PRP treatment for my hair loss (I’m 28 with female pattern baldness running in my family), and I use this product every night before bed. Overall I think it’s a good serum for its price and for what it does. title: Totally works but needs time.
body: Ok, I decided to take a minute to wirte a very honest review about this product. I was suffering of hair loss, so I decided to give it a try. First something that you have to take in a consideration is that any hair products take at least 90 days to work properly. So, for all those comments that they try it for a week and did not work its because you did not gave enough time, this product don't do magic by itself. I used it in the mornings and evenings before going to bed, in a circular motion, you can use also a scalp massager that will increase the circulation. Regarding the formula, yes might be a bit sticky, So I would recomend first, using a few drops and see how your hair and scalp reacts. Also, I have been doing more exercise, drinking more water, I try to stay away from garbage food and I'm eating more healthy. Usually the hair starts falling not because there is something happening outside, most of the times there is something going on inside, like excess of stress, not sleeping enough , losing the natural hydration. So, after using this for more than a month, the hair has been falling less, I can see more hair growing and that's the reason why I am giving 4 stars. I will come back in another month and a half and see if I can change from 4 to 5 but so far, has been working for me. So, if your case is similar to mine.. let me tell you it will work but you have to make some changes in your life and give some time, be patient and try to do not stress about it. <3

This product does give me some build up, however I can wash it off much easier. 2 washes (like always do) and my scalp is squeaky clean again. Only reason I gave it 4 stars was because if the build up, but other than that is a solid product, will be purchasing a third bottle. I would recommend for this to be use in a routine that focuses on length retention, you don’t want to have this growing your hair and then you ends are all split.

I'm shooketh. I am noticing as well that my lashes are heavier, I have very sever dermatitis around my eyebrows, I noticed its healed as well because the serum rubs off on those areas as well. I am noticing the bald spots I developed along my hair line start to fill in, and there is a considerable density to my hair that I can definitely feel. overall I recommend this product, one final note, I also switched my shampoo conditioner routine to a salon grade brand. so this may have impacted these results as well.

After a couple of months of using this serum, I am seeing little baby hairs growing in where I have concentrated the serum. I always apply it to dry hair before bed and I really work it into my scalp with my finger tips. I have to say I am pleasantly surprised, especially for the price. It did take a couple of months of using it about 3 times a week before I started noticing the new growth, so you have to stick with it. For reference the majority of my thinning was in the front above my temples. I think I am seeing more hair there at this point than even before I got sick. Will definitely keep using and repurchase.

title: saved my postpartum hair
body: I recently gave birth to my little girl and began battling hair loss. I know postpartum hair loss is common, but i was losing so much hair that i started developing significant bald spots. I would blow dry my hair and the amount that came off in my hairbrush was a week or twos worth of hair pre-baby. In my desperation, i purchased this along with a hair loss shampoo. For over a month now, I’ve diligently applied this to my hair line and bald spots every night before bed and i already see an amazing difference. My hair in those areas not only looks thicker but there is definitely new growth and baby hairs. My bald spots are looking so much better and frankly I’m pretty impressed - I’m not sure i expected such apparent progress after just a month. I’ve also been using the phyto cyane shampoo for hair loss and my hair has started falling out at a way more normal rate. I definitely recommend this serum (and the shampoo) to anyone experiencing bald patches or extreme hair loss. Worth every penny!

title: no difference
body: I am one of the unlucky people who's hair falls easier while being on hormonal birth control so I was really excited to try a hair serum in attempt to make my hair fuller. The first few times I used this before bed the headache it gave me kept me up, so I struggled to use it consistently. Finally, I managed to use it a couple days in a row, only to realize I suddenly had a BALD SPOT right beside my part, where I had been applying it! While I can't say with 100% certainty that this product is to blame, I can say I haven't changed anything else about my hair care nor have I EVER had a bald spot before. I am not sure if my skin simply reacted to the serum, if I used too much, or if my current hair products and this are incompatible but I will not be using it again! I love The Ordinary products but to say this is distressing would be an understatement, especially seeing as this is said to do the opposite. I would recommend testing in an inconspicuous location for a few weeks first if you plan to give it a try!

title: IMMEDIATE RESULTS
body: If you’re debating on buying this product- buy it! I loose hair when I’m under a lot of stress. Recently I started noticing that I was loosing more hair than normal when washing my hair and began to see a bald spot appearing in the back of my head. After a friend recommended this hair serum to me I decided to give it a try. After wear my bald spot was practically gone and my hair looked and felt fuller. Apply on routes and massage into hair for best results - I have fine hair and it did leave my hair oily, so use it at night.

The reason I bought this was because I have a problem with my hair falling out so frequently. My hair is wavy/curly, fine, but I have a lot of fine hair so it looks thick. I used to have really long hair when I was a teenager I ended up chopping it off to my shoulder because I would have so many strands and clumps falling out all the time. (People literally compared me to my dog who was a huge shedder) It helped for a while but not for long. I’ve been using this product for a little over a week. Usually every two days I wash my hair and a clump of it falls off in the shower. Yes a CLUMP! As someone in their earlier 20s I’ve tried many things including Silica gel and vitamins (but who wants to swallow that every day?) This product worked right away for me. I waited a week just to give it more time for testing. Now I only have a few strands that fall out. No more clumps. I don’t think it’s a lot of money when comparing to all the hair masks, vitamins and shampoos and conditioner treatments I bought to help that didn’t show such immediate results, or work at all for that matter. I also like this product because it doesn’t make my hair look greasy the next day. I was a bit worried about that since you put this on as an overnight treatment. I am very satisfied with the results of this product and hopefully this review can help someone else in a similar situation.

title: Miracle in a bottle for fine hair gals
body: I truly love this product, it's a complete game changer for me. I had been using 10% minoxidil foam for quite a while trying to save my thinning hair (I already have quite thin, fine hair and have been experiencing severe shedding and some hair loss along my hair line and part). I didn't notice any changes to the thickness of my hair, nor see any regrowth and my hair was still coming out in clumps and felt sticky and waxy because of the foam. I researched what else I could try and came across the Multi-Peptide Serum for Hair Density. I was willing to try anything. I've been using it for two weeks now. I am absolutely in love with it. I am already seeing baby hairs come in and my hair appears thicker. I even had my husband point out to me today that my part appeared to not be as wide as it used to be. PLUS, I no longer have literal handful of hair come out when I shower every day. Yes, I have seen others' complaints that this can make your hair greasy at the scalp, it does. This, however, does not bother me because I am an every day hair washer. As someone with such fine hair, I can't go a day without washing without it looking greasy anyway. What this serum has done is help tame my flyaways, give me so much confidence and feel happy about my hair again. I absolutely love it and am thrilled I found it.

I have used this product for a week (5 of 7 days) and was so impressed I already bought another bottle and am writing this review. I have not seen a huge difference yet in density (hence only 4 stars) but know it will take more time for that to be apparent. BUT! Since I have lost a lot of weight this year, my hair has started falling out tremendously. I’m talking like 50+ strands every time I shower. After my 5th night of using this, showered the next morning and I lost so little hair, I couldn’t believe my eyes. I have a drain catcher and I counted only 7 strands. This serum really makes it feel like your hair is soaking in nutrients it has been missing! My hair is very dry, frizzy and fine. I use it at night and it doesn’t go on feeling greasy, and I wake up the next morning with zero grease. I’ve also noticed it seems to break up product build up (hair spray, dry shampoo) for a cleaner looking and feeling scalp. The dropper is not great as other reviewers have said, but you only need very little. I will continue using and will update this review if I start to see growth.

body: Bought this not really expecting to see results but I was pleasantly surprised. I've had a sparse area on the right side of my hairline for as long as I can remember. I used to fill that area in with dark eyeshadow to make it even with the other side but after using this for about a month it seems like the hair in that area is growing back more dense and I no longer have to fill it in with eyeshadow or other products.

Every since I started using this at night, I’ve been growing little baby hairs around my hair line. My hair has also been longer and there has not been any split ends either. One of my favourite products.

My scalp feels a lot less irritated and itchy after I put this on, and I swear it's made my hair feel softer. I'm starting to see some baby hairs now that it's been about a month, and I'm very happy with that. Will keep purchasing.

title: Not for me
body: I am not joking but I felt right away my scalp feels moist!

I was only using it at night so I changed it to every 2 or 3 days but I would see the spots again. I haven't used it in about a week and haven't seen anything since. Hard to put all over scalp (and I don’t know how to improve this) but this product does work for me. I have used this product for 2 years now and it helped a lot with regrowing hair I lose due to hormones changing.

This product...wow. So I have had a dry, sensitive scalp and really fine hair. It would break off so easily. Enter this product. I have been using it for 1 month now. I instantly saw results with my scalp. It has made my scalp so happy; no more dryness, way less sensitive. It’s really made my hair stronger and healthier too, that I have been noticing in the past week. I haven’t seen a ton of new hair growth but I’m hoping to see that in another month!

body: Did nothing to my hair. other ordinary products for skin care are great. this hair one is not so great. very unhappy with this product.

title: I wanted to love this but...
body: I do not usually write reviews, but this stuff is awful! I put a few drops on my scalp before bed. I have really long hair that is medium thickness. It would not wash out! It made my scalp itchy, greasy, and left a waxy residue. A lot of my hair fell out :( Its really disappointing and i'm upset because i take really good care of my hair. If you don't mind the dirty feeling and have no where to go give it a try and see if it works for you. But i could not handle the waxy feeling and the hair loss for me was a huge turn off. You're better off taking biotin and vitamin d for hair growth and thickness.

title: No results after a few months of consistent use.
body: I’ve been using this since mid-July (it’s close to mid-September now) and I just don’t see any real difference. I’ve got healthy hair but a lot of hair fall. This hasn’t reduced that and I don’t see new growth or fullness. I wonder if that’s BECAUSE I’ve got healthy hair so that means there’s nothing to correct here? I’m going to continue using it for another month or so to see if there’s any difference. I feel three months is a fair length of time to wait for results with hair growth. I find I go through one bottle a month. The best way to apply is literally to roughly section hair and place the dropper directly on your scalp where you’ve parted the hair and then squeeze out one drop at a time. Three droppers usually does the trick (the dropper never fills more than about 1/4 of the way for context). I let it kind of run all over my scalp and before it goes past my hairline anywhere I get in there with finger tips to massage it into my scalp. I like that it’s unscented. I guess I’m just disappointed as I was hoping for more of a change and I see no appreciable difference. I do love The Ordinary and have used many other of their products which I’d give five stars to.

title: it works
body: I really wanted to see a difference but the only thing this gave me is a headache with constant use. Fall out has continued and no new growth is seen. Due to Covid-19 I haven't used heat or styling products and kept my hair very natural so I feel the very least this product could have done is make my hair LOOK nice. But nothing. I had thick hair that has turned insanely thin at 25 with balding and receding hairline. Very sad as girl :(

title: magic!
body: I had a really prominent bald spot which I feel is growing back after one of use. Will be repurchasing. One bottle lasts a month tho

title: It works.

They became very small empty spots after the fungi infection and flakes got cleared and I have been trying to fill them. Castor oil didn’t work really well and it was too oily and messy. Amazon hair regen didn’t work after a whole bottle. FINALLY the ordinary magic got those spots filled with baby small hair!

Combined with a cheap silk night cap (vs pony tail or braid ), I now have white fuzz covering my bald spots. I have grey/natural auburn hair. White fuzz is friggin’ awesome vs shiny bald spot.

I’m giving 5 stars because my main concern was that since i have thin hair which gets oily quick (but also dry scalp), the leave in product would make it oily. It has been the complete opposite, i apply a generous amount before bed and wake up with my hair looking fresh, and i even feel like less oily than usual. Definitely easy to use every day.

The Ordinary have so hice products that it’s very difficult decided what’s my favorite but this one is in fact one of the must have for my hair and I have proved thousands. My hair grow faster, denser and beautiful with this magic bottle.
I don’t see any difference in my hair . I am using this more than two months now.

title: Normally not impressed BUT!
body: its only been a week but im already noticing major changes. I have extreme hair shedding issues and have a lot of bald spots, my hair is really fragile and thin. I am no longer excessively shedding, and when i take a shower really little hair falls out. I am so happy with this purchase. It does not make my hair oily, it doesn’t smell and it leaves my hair conditioned, soft and makes it look really healthy the day after. I also notice that my hair gets less oily after using this product. Highly highly recommend

body: I'm normally not impressed but this did it in for me. I've worked in the beauty industy for 5 years plus going to school for it. I only use professional product in my hair and rarely ever use hot tools on it. Last year I lost A LOT of hair from pregnancy, I'm talking about HALF A HEAD of hair in density! I came across this this year and decided to try it out after reading reviews and hey, it's a good price; so why not?! Sometime after finishing the bottle one day I took my hair out of a bun and then actually stopped and looked at it because I had noticed something.. all the hair that I lost from thinning out during my pregnancy grew back! At an impressive amount, I was happily shocked!

title: Amazing for dry scalp

Absolutely amazing! I have eczema and very dry skin on my body and scalp time to time. The areas on my scalp have been there for some years now. I have tried my eczema creams and so many different hair oil makes and nothing worked. I wash my hair once a week and applied this serum every night. A little goes a long way. It really hydrated my dry scalp and got rid of the eczema on my scalp!!! Quite the miracle!

My initial thoughts about this product is not very good because it gave me a headache the first few days I used it, I don’t know why maybe an ingredient or something but I don’t know if I will be repurchasing it.

I purchased five bottles of this because it was out of stock for a couple of months.

title: Miracle product!
body: Truly a miracle product. I have been using this faithfully for 3 months (on my 3rd bottle) and it has made hair grow all over my head. The new hairs are about 4 inches long now. It has also filled in bald spots at my temples and I can't even remember when that area wasn't sparse. I got hit hard with postpartum hair loss and my hair never really recovered after that. I use the product almost every day and use about 2-3 droppers full all around my scalp and massage it in. I don't need to wash it out in the morning because it soaks in and leaves very little residue. What I love about this product: It's effective, inexpensive, TOPICAL, not oily, doesn't need to be washed out, no side effects (besides the headache I got the first 2 days I used it), and worked fast (I saw results after 2 weeks of use). I couldn't have asked for a better product.

I transferred this into a small spray bottle and felt that it was evenly distributed on my scalp. I massage in, and it adds volume to my hair. I’m on my 3rd bottle, and love the results! Unfortunately I think it is because of the Butylene Glycol, which I believe is a form of alcohol? I live in Colorado so my scalp needs moisture or will freak out like it has with this hair serum. I will not be repurchasing. Some of the ingredients are still good, so I wouldn't give it 1 star, plus the price point really didn't break my bank to try it.

body: i have baby fine hair and it started to fall out in little spots due to another product I was using and I was TERRIFIED. After using this product religiously for about 3 weeks I notices new hairs not only coming out of the bald spots but ALL OVER MY HEAD. Im on my second bottle and I now have probably 200-400 new hairs about 1 inch long. I am so grateful for this product!

title: amazed
body: My mom and I have very fine hair and use this every night. It does not make my hair feel oily after a few minutes from application. It does make my hair feel stronger and healthier too. I have bought this product multiple times already!

title: Great product!!
body: I do so much to my hair I wanted something..anything to help. this made my grey's go away how idk but this is gonna be a staple for me

This product has worked amazingly for me. I’m experiencing postpartum hair loss so I gave this a try as nothing was working for my hair, after a couple of weeks of using it, I noticed a big difference on my bald areas. Now it’s part of my rutine every night. I highly recommend it!!

title: Will not purchase again
body: Used this along my hair line where is normally have baby hairs and middle part. I wanted my bangs to be thicker. Noticed no difference after using this product for 1.5 months. Very disappointed since it has many good reviews. Does leave your hair greasy but doesn’t remain after you wash it. Tried it in my brows and actually felt like I lost eyebrow hair. Will not repurchase. Know it’s cheap but doesn’t work.

title: IT WORKS BUT
body: but it's always sold out. idk what's going on with the ordinary rn but so many products have been sold out for extended periods frequently.

title: It works if you use it consistently
body: Haven’t really tried it long enough to see if it ‘works’.. but first impressions-it has this odd scent to it, smells kind of like beer or wheat... or yeast? And upon applying it does make your hair ‘matte’ or greasy looking, but by the morning it seems to have gone away.

title: Worth a try!
body: I used this on clean, dry hair before bed for about 3 weeks and and really works! It strengthened my baby hairs and helped grow my hair faster. My stylist even noticed an increase in thickness right away.
Applied on clean scalp before bed as per instructions, in the morning hair look super oily and greasy

I’ve only been using this serum for around a week now, I applied a couple of drops on my hair and massaged it on my scalp for a couple of seconds everyday for a week and my hair doesn’t look greasy at all. I didn’t use any of the other hair products that I normally use so I could get a feel of what this serum is doing, my hair looked shiny and felt very fresh. It has no scent to it. I also applied it to my brows and my lashes using a spooly. I’ve been warned it’s not the most recommended thing but I couldn’t help test out whether or not it’ll help thicken my lashes and lengthen them. Now I can’t tell you whether it’s just the placebo effect or not but I feel like my lashes might’ve actually gotten a little bit thicker.

title: from thin flat to fuller looking!
body: I did a video review on my youtube channel "soappiethestrange" if you guys want a visual but I felt this serum was super light on the scalp and gave off no scent. It worked best when my hair was still a lil damp and i directly had the product in the syringe, let it drip drip and applied the drops onto my scalp and massaged it in. After a couple weeks of using it.. I noticed baby hairs growing ans my hair appearing to be a lot more fuller than what it was before. I still have a little than half a bottle left so a little goes a long way (approx 2-3months use) hopefully this helped and it's worth a try giving the price for it.

title: Life saver for dry scalp!!!
body: I love this product! I wear tape in my extensions, and while they are usually gentle, I can sometimes get tangles around the tab, and removing them can be slightly painful. this serum helps get my hair back into tip top shape while I'm taking a break from extensions. I love it!

title: amazing
body: Life saver for dry scalp! I have been struggling for a couple of years with a dry scalp and dandruff. This product has saved my scalp and have made my scalp so happy, I highly recommend this product!

title: WOW
body: There are no words to describe how amazing this product has been and changed my life. After massive post partum hair loss this was the only thing that brought my front hair baldness back to normal. Thank God this exists!!!
This stuff is amazing I saw a huge difference in the fullness of my hairline in only a few weeks
Unfortunately I didn’t notice any difference with my hair. I have been through 2 bottles, my hair type is thin and oily, so I was very excited for this, but will not be repurchasing

title: icky
body: this makes my hair so sticky and matted and disgusting. haven't seen any improvements

title: Lives up to the hype for sure
body: I can’t wait until this is back in stock. I had new growth after just a few weeks! Amazing product & price.

title: Give it a try for sure
body: A one star is a lot more than I’d give this. Bought to help hair thinning at crown and thought it was helping until I forgot it at home when I went away for a week. After a week of non use I noticed my hair line becoming even more thin at the parts I paid extra attention massaging this oil into. Plus my baby hairs that were growing broke and became shorter! It also made my scalp very tender and red!!!! I used it constantly nightly for about 2 months and was about 1/4 of the way thru the bottle, glad I realized the effects before they became way worse!

I'd recommend. I use this about once to twice a week before bed and I have noticed less hair in the shower and when brushing. Not miracle product for me, I still have fine hair, but not concerned about it thinning, hair feels healthier and my scalp is less irritated. Side note, I started taking daily collagen around the same, so hard to rule out which one helped so much, but somethings working.
My hair is getting fuller on the top center! This is working within just two weeks of usage.

I want to get to the point and tell you that this product DEFINITELY WORKS! I bought this product because I noticed thinning and some balding around my hairline. I've been applying this almost every night. I noticed increased hair density around my hairline about six-ish weeks in. I apply a few drops around my hair and some drops just all around my scalp and massage it in. I would definitely recommend this product. It's a great price, and one bottle would last at least 4-5 months, depending on how much you use. The key thing is to use this product as consistently as possible.

title: Dropper doesn’t work
body: The dropper doesn’t work. When I pulled the dropper out of the bottle the oil just spills out. Not only did this make a mess, but I had to use more product because the oil would spill before I could even put it on my scalp.

title: Lost hair from it..
body: I must be the 1 on 1000 person who lost hair by trying this.. I tried it for a few weeks and then I noticed my hair getting thinner where I put the product... I must have been the unlucky one :( It's been a few months now and I don't feel like my hair grew back at those places... I sould have taken picture before

title: Results for the Better
body: Definitely noticed changes in my hair after using this product. I had generally thick hair prior but had some thin hairs all over my head that were prone to breakage, and my hair was dull. I apply this maybe once a week after washing my hair and scalp and after everything is dry, I massage it in. My hair is really shiny at the ends and I see less split ends when I look down. It feels a lot thicker and coarser. Have I seen new growth? Yes, especially at the edges of my hair around my forehead, where I concentrate the product the most. It's very watery and leaves no residue on the scalp or hair, which I love; I'm very used to using oils on my scalp for hair growth and this product is such a welcomed break from oiling my scalp. Less messy, no strong fragrance, and I definitely see results. I think anyone can use it, even if you have thin hair. I don't think this product can completely regrow bald spots or help with serious scalp trauma, but it is a great product if you're trying to get better hair.

title: it works!
body: I have oily and thin hair. After the first use, I noticed my hair didn’t get oily as quickly as before after wash. And it also helped my hair to get thick a little bit. But most importantly, it helped my hair to grow! I just talked my bf into trying it.

title: Please give this serum a try
body: I really enjoy this product. I have thick and heavy hair and between tight ponytails and parting it to the right for nearly 10 years, I was having some thinning on my left side and it made me so insecure. I bought this during the Rouge sale and I am so happy with the results I have seen thus far. My hair in that spot looks thicker and makes me feel so much better. I will definitely continue using and the price for this product is great.

I wanted to write a review for those of you who are skeptics or hesitating. I will not receive anything for this review, so you know. Solely doing it because I have suffered from hair loss for a while and it was devastating. I have used a very expensive product where I used the product 3 months on 3 months off. Yes, I did see results, but it was getting pricy to keep doing this routine. When I discovered The Ordinary hair serum and saw the price, thought I’d give it a try. I have not been happier with the results. This serum worked wonders for me. I couldn’t believe it. Hair near the front of my head is growing back, hair is thicker, shinier and healthier. Please, don’t hesitate, give it a try. For that price, you really don’t have much to lose. I hope you do and I hope it works for you as it has for me.

title: wow I am in awe of this stuff
body: Leaves a weird residue on my hair and makes it greasy feeling and looking.. also I wanted it for a little balding spot on the left of my head and I broke out in zits the next day around my forehead.. on a positive note I feel like it worked a little bit but maybe I was trying to be optimistic

title: This stuff is amazing!
body: I bought this a month ago and have used it nightly every night since. I have not noticed new hair growth yet, but I don't expect to for a while as my hair thinning is genetic. But that being said, my hair has genuinely never been so soft and shiny before. Like, it's a very noticeable difference. Also, I used to get pimples or these red bleeding spots on my head (I think this contributes to the hair thinning) and those pimples are completely gone as a result of using this stuff. I would definitely recommend this product, even if it's just to get shinier, healthier hair. It's definitely a great product.

title: you need this. I promise. it works.
body: Ive struggled with thinning hair for 4 years now and im only 20, this product worked miracles for me in about 1 month of application i saw incredible improvments in my hair. I normally thinned out in the front because of tress and other medical factors but with using this product my hair has been looking noticeably different. I just ordered a second bottle this really is my holy grail.

I have type 4a/b hair. There's been significant thinning at the top of my head. Most hair serums are supposed to start showing results in about three months. HOWEVER, I've been using this serum for about a month and there has been a SIGNIFICANT INCREASE IN DENSITY. I am STILL on my first bottle ppl! There's less fallout when I comb my hair and scalp pain is GONE! It does get a bit itchy but this formula requires a clean dry scalp and that is counter to my hair type. So I oil my scalp in the A.M. and apply the serum before bed. I wash my hair once every four days so as to avoid buildup. If I can I'll post another pic at three months. I'm reordering right after I post this review!

wow this stuff works. my hair in the front is very thin and I've been struggling with it for many years. I'm only in the late twenties and this product definitely works. I've been using it for a month and the patches of bald spots on my head are getting noticably thicker. I'm so impressed and can't wait to see the results the longer is use it. it also is great to leave in at night and doesn't make your hair greasy or oily in the morning. however it does give me a headache but not often.

Have been using this nightly. It looks greasy upon immediately applying but by the time I wake up there’s not any significant residue. Unfortunately I’ve had no changes in my hair. I did take before and after photos to compare. Will continue to use through the bottle but won’t be repurchasing based off current results. Disappointing but I guess was worth a try

title: not effective for me
body: Almost finished one bottle. It did absolutely nothing to my hair. Nothing!

title: Not for me
body: I have been using this on my eyebrows only. I’ve seen a few reviews mentioning headaches after using this, but as a person who is prone to headaches and has been diagnosed with migraines, I have had zero issues. Might be because I am not using it on my scalp or that I only use a tiny drop on each eyebrow once a day. Because of how little I use, this bottle is going to last me forever!! I have very fine, blonde brow hair. Because the hair is so thin, it is usually very difficult to get brow products to adhere to it (so I end up with product on the skin underneath but not much on the hair itself). I have been looking for a way to style my brows more naturally with brow gel and after using this just a few times, my Kush and CT brow gels are working so much better!! I love it and look forward to seeing even more results.

title: Yes!
body: I really wanted to like this due to all of the positive reviews but this serum caused my scalp to break out and led to small patches of eczema around my hair line. While I was using it I didn't notice any changes in hair growth/fall out.

title: Works well!
body: this is such a great product. I applied this around my hair line every night for 3 weeks and I have new hairs growing and thicker exsisting hairs... I was not expecting it to work so well!

title: Not sure if it’s for kinky curly hair textures
body: Believe me when i say this - it works! I have a bald spot on the left side of my forehead where my baby hair grows. I wish i had taken a before photo because was quite bald. After about 5 days of using this, in the morning and at night, I can see my baby hairs growing out. I tried using it on my brows but it doesn't work as well. The hair on my brows do look a bit denser but no new hairs are growing it. I will be drowning my bfs head in this for some hair growth. Obviously some things will work for others and some won't but its 17bucks so its not going to kill anyone.
I haven’t seen much difference since using this serum, it also leaves a weird film on my hair so I don’t use it right after washing my hair anymore.

title: KEEPER!!!!!!
body: I have been using this serum every time I wash my hair (1-2 times a week) for a little over a month now. I section my hair to ensure even coverage of the scalp and I take time to massage it in. I have noticed a HUGE difference in the thickness of my hair at the root, as well as hair loss. I lose very few hairs when I wash (I used to lose clumps), and I’m happy that it doesn’t dry or irritate my sensitive scalp. I paid with the Olaplex hair oil, and my hair has never felt better.

title: Amazing!!
body: I bought this to grow out my eyebrows, and after applying this every night for 2 weeks, i’ve seen a large difference in hair growth!! I definitely recommend!!!

title: Best hair growth serum
body: Love this hair serum. hair is thin where I part and this drum had done wonders. Hair is getting g thicker at the part. Doesn’t leave creasy hair. Great price point. A bottle lasts me a month since I was my hair everyday.

title: Definitely recommend.
body: I’m not one to write reviews but I had to with this one. I love The Ordinary Products, and this one did not disappoint. I’ve always have thinner hair along my hair line, I just figured it would be like that forever until I came across this product. I massage the oil into my scalp every night along my hair line, I’ve been doing it for 2 weeks.... JUST 2 WEEKS and I’ve seen I HUGE change, I swear my hairline is getting thicker by the day. It does make your hair look wet and feel greasy on application but by morning it has completely soaked into your scalp and leave no greasy residue. It is on the more pricey side for the ordinary but totally worth it. I most definitely recommend this product.

title: Post Partum solution
body: I’ve been using this serum for over a week straight and I haven’t seen any changes to my hairline but I know this will possibly change as I get closer to finishing the entire product religiously. With that said, I use this serum during the morning only because it gives me awful headaches. I drink plenty of water to stay hydrated and I don’t overuse the product. Use caution, if you’re sensitive headed then don’t use this product. I’m in my early thirties and post partum so I’m literally using anything to help boost my hair growth that was lost during post pregnancy.

I have been using this product every night for about 3 weeks now. I have a dry itchy scalp and my only solution was to wash my hair every day(which is bad for your hair) and still would have flakes everywhere. I part my hair and apply 1 drop about an inch apart(about 3-4 drops per part) and part my hair every inch. Then I would go to sleep. I wash my hair every other day now and basically have NO flaky or itchy scalp anymore. Idk about this for hair growth, since I have only been using it for 3 weeks and we all know no magic serum will make your hair grow as fast as we want but definitely helped my scalp!

title: Castor Oil Really?
body: Why is Castor oil NOT listed as an ingredient? Some humans are highly allergic to the castor bean.

title: a bottle of frustration
body: extremely difficult to apply and leave my hair ridiculously oily and disgusting.

title: love it!
body: In my case, is working! After a month of use I noticed new hairs starting to grow! My hairdresser asked me what I was using, she noticed all the new hair growing! Is a liquid consistency, to me the smell is very light. Everybody scalp is different, what it works for me it does not mean is going to work you! Start building resistance, by using it every other day.

title: Not as I hoped
body: I was super excited to try this hair serum but it had such an adverse reaction. It caused a migraine, a continuous tingling sensation on my scalp, and irritation. I wouldn't recommend such a strong concoction to anyone. It has a strong chemical scent to it too.

title: Amazing
body: Purchased in hopes that it would make my hair line fuller as it is starting to thin out. I have naturally thick hair everywhere. This didn’t add any thickness, fill in areas that are thin, make hair any softer. I’ve been using for 2 months daily I also only wash my hair every 3 days and it build up gunk quickly.

Love this product. I have only been using it for just over 2 weeks now but I see and feel such a difference in my hair already. Not necessarily with growth but with texture and strength. I put this in my hair about an hour before bed I massage it in really well and although it looks SO greasy by the time I wake up in the morning my hair feels so soft and looks so shiny, healthy and freshly washed. So it has definitely helped prolong hair washing without looking limp and oily. In addition, it also has reduced the number of hairs that fall out each day, I can tell because I used to have to empty my brush every 3 days but now I do it every 5-6. Huge improvement already in such a short time frame. I am excited to see the further improvements as I keep using this product!

title: This stuff actually works
body: I've been struggling with "balding spots" by my hairline my entire life. Decided to give this a try, cause it's super affordable and I had nothing to lose at this point. After using it religiously twice a day for about 2 weeks, I've noticed baby hairs sprouting out the sides of my hairline, exactly where I was applying this product. The "bald" spots look much fuller and healthier overall. I will continue using it. The trick is to also take your time, massaging it in.

title: Didn't work.
body: Used two bottles of this in a row hoping for results. Didn't see any hair growth or fullness. Left my hair greasy in the morning when applied at night. Clogs pores.

title: No on this one...sorry, Ordinary
body: It’s amazing it help me for my dry scalp and make my hair look so healthy after only one week !

title: Bold Brows or Bust
body: I love just about everything the Ordinary makes (seriously, my bathroom looks like a store), but I have to say no to this one. I bought at least 5-6 bottles of this and faithfully used it every night for months. My hair is the same as it ever was, and continued to fall out as much as it ever did. Bummer...I had very high hopes!

I have been using this for a week now, I put drops on top by my roots since I feel I am lacking volume and my hair is thinning on top. I put it on at night and every morning when I wake up, I notice more volume at the top of my head even after days of not washing my hair when my volume should be at its lowest. So this stuff really seems to be working. Will definitely be continuing to use it.

So I bought this product because I wanted to try this on my eyebrows. They're patchy and sparse, but have potential to thicken I had hoped. Similar to another post here, I put one drop on my fingers, rub them together, and swipe on my brows. Morning and night. Two weeks later, my eyebrows are thicker, darker, and starting to fill in sparse areas. It's amazing, and I am sticking to it!

title: love!!!
body: This saved my life. I had been losing so much hair from the front of my hair for almost 2 years now and No matter what I tried nothing would make it fill back up. I’ve been using this for around less than a month and 75%-80% of the hair has always grown out and my hair looks full again. I genuinely couldn’t believe it but I swear by this product, it’s so easy and amazing.

title: headaches
body: I've been using this for just over a week and I've already been seeing more baby hairs and thickness in my overall hair. I have a very sensitive scalp and dermatitis but this product has not irritated my scalp and instead it has actually calmed it! I put it on in the evening on dry hair and it does make my hair greasy when it is first put on, but I have very thin hair. I just put it on a few hours before bed time so that it doesn't just rub off on my pillow. By the morning my hair looks like second day hair which I don't mind because the results I'm seeing already makes it worth it. I'm expecting that it'll take a few months before my hair is looking fuller again so I'm going to keep persevering with this product :)

title: AMAZING FOR POST PARTUM THINNING!
body: love it ! This product is amazing !!! The ordinary is the best !

Love this! Has really helped with my very dry scalp I’ve tried many things and this has worked the best. I put it on every night and it doesn’t make my hair greasy or anything. It has also just made my overall hair health so much better and I’ve noticed thicker hair after continuous use.
Gave me the worst headache of my life and if you over use it’ll make your scalp hurt so bad. Couldn’t use long enough to know if it works.

I used to have hair that was always fine but I had never experienced thinning until 1 year after my daughter was born. It had been a very difficult transition noticing my scalp in pictures. I decided for this price, to give this a try in conjunction with the Moon Juice Super Hair supplements and I am super impressed for the results after just a few weeks! Will continue to use! Posted pictures to show a 2 weeks difference!

title: Very satisfied
body: Did not see any effect after several uses. The formula is very runny, and makes scalp oily looking. Also makes hair very sticky/dry. Would not recommend.

title: Dandruff/Dry Scalp
body: I started feeling the difference right after the first use,not too sure about the hair density,but my hair loss has reduced drastically,i normally massage the serum on my bald spots before going to bed and wash it away the next day,i used to see a lot of hair fall on my pillows and all over the house,but i dont see even a single hair on my pillows anymore,very satisfied with the product...

title: 10/10 rating!!
body: I bought this for scalp dryness &/ dandruff, I was unsure which one I had. I saw a difference after 3 uses!! I put it on after I spray & comb my hair & blowdry/air dry. If you blow dry it will kind of be like you sprayed too much hair spray @ the roots but it’s goes away! I’ve noticed the more I use this product the longer I can go between washes (4-5 days)...it’s allowed me to use ALOT less dry shampoo even w working out!

title: Does not work for postpartum hair loss!
body: i thought I would love this product as i love all the other Ordinary face serums, but this serum makes my hair so oily after use...

I LOVE THIS PRODUCT. I've been using it for about 2 weeks now and I see new growth all over my head. I started using after experiencing a 6-8 month thinning after having very thick hair. This product has worked so quickly I will stock up in case it runs out. I usually put it on at night before bed and wake up to thicker looking hair and no grease. I put it on every night all over my scalp (about 1 dropper total) for the best results. If you're thinking about it, just buy it!!!!

I hoped this would help with some serious postpartum hair loss, but definitely did nothing. Concentrated use near spots I noticed were thinning and did not notice any reduction or slow down in hair loss. Very disappointed!
My ride or die choice. It took me 2 months to use out of the first bottle and it helped my hair to grow visibly. I’m on my second bottle now and I would like to use this product life long!

title: It’s a NO from me.
body: I’m very unsure, I did notice quite a lot of volume and hair density, but I’ve also noticed little red bumps at the beginning of my hairline. I don’t know if I’ll continue using it, I’ll decide.

title: i highly recommend this
body: Made my hair really oily and dirty. Had to purchase a scalp scrub to get rid of all of the buildup this leaves. Before purchasing this product, I saw some reviews of people noticing grey hairs poking out after using it. Gave it a go anyway. I’ve had 2 grey hairs since I was about 14 (25 now). Now they’ve increased in quantity about a month into me using the product. I don’t know if my hair git any denser using this, but it got greasier and I got grey hairs. To top it off I gotta wash my hair practically daily when I use this (normally it’s every 3-4 days). So it’s a big no from me.

title: it works!
body: this hair serum is fantastic. it works. i put it on at night, when i wake up it has soaked in and makes my hair thicker and healthier. much cheaper than other hair serums and works better.

title: its ok
body: It makes my hair feel thicker and smoother. It can make your hair look greasy but if you avoid putting in the part and massage it in, it’s not very noticeable. It reduced dandruff in the winter and helps with eyebrows too! Definitely recommend.

I cant speak to if this works for hair growth yet because ive only been using for 1 week so far. With the ingredients in it, i am very hopeful. I definitely wouldnt use this everyday however.
