I like to put this serum in after i wash my hair and my hair is already wet. Contrary to what it says on the bottle, it kind of makes your hair look a little oily looking if you put it on dry hair. It doesnt feel oily but it definitely looks that way, ESPECIALLY on second day hair. So because of that, its a no for me. Just purchased a spray that has procapil in it and Im trying that out instead.

title: Definite repeat purchase for me!
body: I am so pleased with The Ordinary product line! I use this all along my hairline each evening and also took the advice of another user and swipe on my brows. This really works! I once had a glorious mane until menopausal hormones took it away! I also have to agree with another user that it seems like it also reduces graying? YES PLEASE. A great price -This one is definitely worth a try!

title: don’t waste your money
body: Literally did nothing for me. I massaged it in, I followed the rules! But nothing. I’m glad it was cheap because LOL it did not work!

title: No difference *yet*
body: It’s a good product reduce dandruff .Help in relaxation Had some growth on crown area.hope it works for growth of hair just started with first one

title: Amazing. New hair growth after 10 days of using
body: I live The Ordinary products so I though I’d try this for my fine thin hair. I’ve only been using it for about 45 days (2nd bottle) And I don’t notice anything *YET*. To be fair, my hair grows excruciatingly slow, so I will continue its use and update As necessary- In addition I use a teeny bit on a spooly for my brows and it may be helping with some regrowth in this area? (Or maybe the lockdown has me ignoring my appearance More than I thought)? LOL

title: headache galore
body: Amazing. I have hair extensions and from ripping them out I had accidentally got bald spots from it. I used this about 10 times and it was all grown back in. Pictures we after 3 weeks. Now it's been about two months and it's fully come back. Plus all new hair growth around hair line. Best product I've ever used.

Severe Migranes. I’ve never experienced a headache with a product yet I’ve been using this for 5 days and have been taking tylenol for the 5. I just realized this is what’s giving me the headaches. Throwing the entire bottle away since I can’t even return it due to all stores being closed. I should of read the reviews a couple of people have mentioned their headache experience.

title: LOVE this!
body: Unique product that delivers so many ingredients at a great price. I love that this exists! I should admit that I have naturally dark, thick, fast-growing hair, but it grows like crazy when I use this. I'm just finishing my FOURTH bottle and ordering more today. Pretty sure I will use this forever :)

title: effective product
body: I have been using this product consistently for a few months and it has helped my baby hairs grow SO much! I have had those short hairs forever and nothing has ever helped them grow other than this. Sometimes I combine it with a little castor oil overnight for maximum results. Definitely takes time but this product legitimately helps with stubborn hair growth

title: Works on Brows Too!
body: I purchased this for the sole purpose of using for eyebrow regrowth and it has DELIVERED. Zero irritation or sensitivity (and my skin is v sensitive), even with daily use. To use, I just drop onto my finger and then wipe over my brow. I saw growth after about 2-3 weeks and my eyebrows are completely different now after 2 months of consistent use: patches have been filled in, they’re fuller and longer. I can now use just brow gel instead of needing a pencil everyday too! This stuff works.

title: Did what it said it would
body: I tried this product expecting it to fail miserably but slightly hopeful because I have had success with other The Ordinary products. Bah ba ba bah! Holy smokes did this work alright! Using the dropper I distributed it along my scalp and massaged vigorously each night for 1 month, then twice a week since (3 months) my lightly receding hairline is no longer visible it has little baby hairs all over it. My hair looks fuller and more voluminous. Did not leave my hair looking greasy the next morning. I am actually really impressed.

title: THE ABSOLUTE BEST BUY EVER
body: My hair is naturally fine, and I wanted just a little more volume without having to use hair spray or mousse. This product came through - and then some! My hair is always super oily and greasy by the end of the day. After using this product, my hair still looks and feels like I just washed it. Honestly, it's like a miracle.
i found that this really helped my fine and thin hair grow longer. it also helped with dry scalp and dandruff. i love this product and this brand!

title: Amazing for hair density and growth!
body: It was recommended to me by a beauty consultant and I didn’t think much of it, but decided to give it a try, since the price is very attractive. I grew a full head of baby hairs!! I was freaking out over excessive hair loss and even went to see trichologist, who told me I had an “abnormal” amount of baby hair growing, so this product definitely works! It will be a bit annoying in the beginning as the hair will be sticking out a lot, bit once it grows out, you don’t have to worry about it.

title: AMAZING for thinning hair
body: Wow, I can't believe I'm saying this, but after a week of using it, I started growing baby hairs? I wear the hijab so I feel that my hair is thinning close to my forehead. IT LITERALLY GREW BABY HAIR THERE! I'm AMAZED.

title: thickened up my eyebrows
body: Wow, this stuff is AMAZING! Between a thyroid issue, stress, and general hair changes due to getting older, my hair has gotten SO thin in my part line. I have been so self conscious about it, so I started this product at the recommendation of a friend and saw instant results. I stopped using it for a couple weeks (I was trying to wash train my hair, which is hard when you use this product daily because I like to wash it out in the morning) and noticed my hair thinning again. I put this in last night, and the difference is already unbelievable. The photo on the left is yesterday and the one on the right is today. So amazing!

title: new holy grail! amazing for oily scalp/hair.
body: I have been taking a single drop, rubbing between the tips of my second fingers, and wiping it across my eyebrows. One drop in the morning. One drop in the evening. It's taken a couple of months but I can now see that the individual hairs on my eyebrows are thicker, and longer. I've been keeping my eyebrows tidy for the last 20 years - I don't over-pluck - just remove the stray hairs. The outer part of my eyebrows has always naturally been thin. Whilst I can't be 100% sure I think that there are some new hairs in that area. Or maybe there are hairs which are normally super-fine, which are now thicker (darker) and longer? My eyebrows overall though do look a lot better. I'm really curious to see if this improvement continues. I'd love to have thick bushy eyebrows!!

title: Does SOMETHING
body: This is my new holy grail, decided to give it a try and noticed less hair fallout during showers/at the end of the day. Also helped get my oily hair under control! My hair gets so oily by second day, but use of this serum can extend washes out 4-5 days! Probably helped nourish my scalp which stopped over-oil production. Serum is NOT oily or sticky at all, upon application it may seem greasy but your scalp absorbs all of it by the morning. Shaft/ends of my hair also seem healthier as well. Helped improve hair and scalp health while saving $$ by using less shampoo, conditioner, and dry shampoo!
Can definitely tell the difference in the shower on the weeks I use it vs. the weeks I don't.

title: Must Have
body: Every winter I have problems with a dry and irritated scalp. Not dandruff, but just dryness. I have tried so many products to soothe it and help and this is the only one that gave noticeable results that were even an improvement over my 'regular' scalp. I noticed a difference after one week of nightly use, and I have continued to use it every other night for a few months no. Even my hair colorist of 8 years noticed and asked what I was using to he could recommend it to people.

title: Best hair loss product I have tried so far
body: My hairline has thinned out a lot so to me itching my dry scalp for years. Then I used dry shampoo way too much to cover thinking areas and made it worse. My hair is already fine and I don’t have a lot. Theirs sparse it looked, the more I messed with it and prob made it worse. I bought like $200 worth of various products in a panic and have been trying them. This has made the biggest different with the least amount of consistency. I put a few drops in at night and it’s totally dry and not greasy by the AM. I’m starting to notice a tiny difference and am so grateful. Going to report back again once I finish the bottle.

title: It works!!
body: Bought this because I have slight hair loss and breakage at my roots from heat damage. I'm a little over halfway through the bottle now and have been using it for almost a month (I use a lot though). I first noticed that my hair started falling out a lot less from brushing and showering, etc. My bald spots are also noticeably growing in which you can see in the photos. Definitely buying again!

title: Great product, great results
body: As someone else suggested here I’ve been using it on my scalp when my hair is damp after showering in the morning and using it that way. I’ve been using it for about three months and have in fact noticed some new growth and baby hairs sprouting. I just purchased a second bottle and look forward to seeing continued results. (Gave 4 stars because my lid was slightly defective and the bottle does not seal properly)

title: it really does work!
body: I have been using this product for about three months and I have definitely noticed a difference in my hair growth and fullness. I have heat damaged hair and it has really helped the breakage grow out better. I do agree with other reviews that say it does make hair a little greasy over time but not enough to stop using it.

I saw some hair growth within a week! It’s starting to fill in some of the baldish patches. I have a weird patch on my eyebrows where there’s less hair and it helped too! It does make my hair a bit greasy but I can live with that.

title: Positive Results
body: Three weeks of use and I’ve already seen positive results. I apply to my scalp while my hair is damp. I’ve noticed considerably less hair fallout on pillows, etc. and when I brush my hair there is less hair in the brush. I’ll wait a few months to see how regrowth is coming along, since I use this with Rogaine. I’m very happy so far!

title: waste of money
body: no difference what so ever, don't buy waste of money

title: Not sure yet...
body: Not sure if my hair is more dense. My scalp is less dry and slightly broken out, which may be unrelated. I am going to use the whole bottle and if my hair seems more dense or my scalp more healthy.

title: Less Hair Loss Noticed!
body: This is the third bottle I've purchased for my husband . We haven't noticed any new hair growth, but it has stopped, or slowed hair loss!

title: Gamechanger
body: This stuff really works!! I have hair loss due to thyroid issues and have slowly noticed my hair thinning and falling out more over the last 5 years. I’ve tried collagen, biotin, more iron- everything. This is the first thing that has worked!! At first I noticed just my hair not falling out as much in the shower, then I noticed it feeling a little stronger. I just went for a haircut and the stylist said she sees tons of new hair growth all over. I am so thankful for this product! I use it about 4 days a week. I put several drops on if I know I’m washing my hair the next morning. On a normal night I put maybe 2 drops in. I highly highly recommend and this is after less than 1 bottle!

Surprisingly, it works! I have thinning hair at my temples and across the top of my part. Mostly due to hormonal perimenopause conditions. I started dotting drops of this in my thin spots and rubbing it in nightly. Some nights I skip because it can make my hair look greasy the next day, so it depends on my washing schedule. Within 4 weeks I could see baby hairs filling in, within 2 months more hair and dare I say it also seems less grey?! I can pull my hair back from my face and not worry about my bald spots. I had used women's rogaine in the past and after about a year of use it became reactive to my scalp, instant irritation. This serum doesn't have the chemical irritants in it and feels gentle to my skin.

title: Noticeable Change!
body: Great product, noticed difference in hair density after completion of one bottle - I used more than the recommended drops every night however. About to place my 2nd and 3rd order for it!

title: Do Not Order.
body: Absolutely a good product I see a visible difference in my hair fall its an amazing product I will but it again worth buying it

Have only had it for a couple weeks and use it sporadically but even that short amount of time I have definitely noticed an increase in thickness to my hairline. Will continue using to see long term results! It does leave my roots slightly oily but not a big concern.
I had a severe breakout on my scalp and then a systemic reaction to this product. It's been terrible. I am still dealing with trying to get the hives under control.
Made a visible difference my hair after just the first use! I have never written a review before but thought that I would for this product!
After applying it to my edges, I have definitely noticed increased density, but not length. Minus 1 point due to residue build up.

title: Baby hairs are back!
body: I'm not one to be sold on the hair growth stuff, but decided to take a chance on this, and wouldn't ya know - baby hairs are back!

title: no results
body: I bought this in October and it’s now March, I’ve used it everyday. It has literally done nothing for my hair, it’s like putting drops of water on to my scalp. I read about this product that it won’t stop thinning hair but will help hair thicken while it grows, I did not experience that.

title: Didn't work for me
body: My hair is dark, straight, thick but they tend to stick on my scalp lifeless. This serum works like a charm for my hair. I apply daily after my hair is washed a air dried. It makes my hair look fuller and more healthy. I don’t even need hair spray anymore - I hate the sticky feeling and smell of all hair spray!

title: literal miracle worker
body: I have been experiencing a lot of hair loss and thinning that is making me really self conscious. I had high hopes for this product, but I used it every single night according to the instructions until the entire bottle was gone, and I saw ZERO change. No new growth, no extra volume or density, nothing. I do appreciate that it didn't make my hair greasy or oily, which I was worried about, but the dropper doesn't work very well and I would always end up with extra product running all over my hands. I think a spray product or something less runny would be better. It looks like other reviewers have had luck with this, but it did nothing for me- so just be aware that results will vary.

This product has SAVED my self-esteem!!! I have been suffering from a lot of hair loss due to traction alopecia and also my birth control and stress. this product has helped so much in restoring my hairline and also bringing back fullness to the parts of my scalp that were thinning. I am really really bad about using this as often as i should and i still see results. I really like that it is not super oily and it has also helped me a lot with dandruff as well. I cannot recommend this product enough! I have very fine hair if that matters.
I can’t speak for any fun hair growth, but this has definitely improved my scalp health! I have a couple of patches of dermatitis that I’ve had for years that this is definitely helping.

title: Unexpected Results...
body: This stuff works! i use it daily on my eyebrows and scalp. Currently on my third bottle, and it works! It take time, patience and consistency but this product is wonderful. Ive been using it for 2 months straight now. it brings growth, thickness and volume. it is best used at night before bed. it made my baby hairs grow in so thick and covered bald spots. definitely the cheapest, and most effective hair serum ive ever used.

I have long, fine, colour-treated hair with oily roots and dry ends. I’ve been looking for a product to help with thinning at my temples and breakage at the back of my neck; though I can’t tell if I have any new growth yet, I’m VERY surprised to find that the serum doesn’t make my already grease-prone roots greasier. In fact, I usually have to wash my hair daily but somehow I’m now able to extend the time between washes to ever second or third day! On top of that, it’s given my roots unexpected volume; my hair no longer lies flat, it has bounce at the roots. Note: I apply the serum AFTER I shower, in to wet hair, I don’t use it sparingly either. I separate my hair in to sections and apply at least 2 drops per section and massage. Blow dry as usual and I have bouncy, non-greasy hair!
I had a stress balding spot that this product helped thicken within a couple of months use.

I have thinning at my crown and lately it has improved. However I am using this serum along with different treatments so it is hard to say exactly what is working but I have had a lot of success with Deciem products.

I purchased this product because of my thinning curly hair... After one full month of use every night before bed on a clean scalp, I have noticed improved scalp conditions and my new growth feels incredibly soft! Also no more flakey scalp. Havent seen any improvement hair growth/density wise. Maybe its too soon to tell but I will continue using for a second month and see!

title: Not worth it
body: I have thinning hair (more thin in certain areas of my scalp) and unfortunately this product did not make any difference or make any hair grow in those areas. I did notice a big improvement of the amount of hair I lose, however overall this didn't wow me enough to repurchase again. I have used half the bottle now, so obviously it's not doing much.

title: excellent
body: so far has helped with dry scalp x100. have yet to notice a difference in the look and feel of the fullness of my hair but it is pretty new to me still. recommend for scalp dryness for sure

title: Has worked wonders!
body: I was highly skeptical that this would yield any results, but after using it almost daily for about 2 months I'm honestly seeing a whole new hairline! There is hair growing where I cant recall hair growing before, and there is so much new growth I can hardly keep it tidy! I love that it's easy to apply, doesn't make your hair sticky or greasy, and it's so affordable! This product has far exceeded my expectations.

title: Not sure if it helps
body: I'm on my second bottle and I'm not sure yet if it does anything. the second bottle makes my hair oily and feels different than the 1st one. I hope to see results after this second one if not :(

title: Miracle in a bottle
body: I have all these annoying baby hairs popping out of my head! This is amazing, Ive always battled with thinning on top of my scalp, tried all the products but realized they had side effects. Loved the price of this, and how it made my scalp feel after the first few tries. Im on bottle #2, and can def sense more thickness in my hairline. I dont use it everyday either, mostly because I dont want my hair to get oily. I usually use it after I wash my hair, when hair is damp, massage into scalp and then I run the blow dryer through to dry up any residue.
Been using for 2 months. Hair is a little thicker and baby hairs are growing in. Less shedding. I am 52 and had some hormonal changes that caused hair loss. I am buying again.

title: pretty good
body: After I dyed my hair, it started shedding more than usual so I decided to try this. I used it for a week and I do like it. Less shedding, scalp feels healthier, hair got so soft, light and bouncy. I even put it on hair length because it smoothes it and makes it less frizzy. When I just put it on my hair looks like I put water on it, but after 10 mins it’s all dry and clean. I don’t know how it made somebody greasy, it actually makes me less greasy than usual. I gave it my husband whos hair had been falling out a lot and he said that his hair feels different, fuller and softer. We’ll keep on using and see if we get more extreme results.

title: Amazing!
body: I love this product. I tend to only use it a day before (morning and night) I’m about to wash my hair. However, it is not greasy AS LONG as you do not use too much. I use an entire dropper amount on my scalp and massage it in. I naturally have a lot of hair so I cannot say if I have fuller hair but I have noticed many baby hairs around my hairline. I also noticed a lot less shedding. My secret is to also use this one my sparse eyebrows and this has worked miracles!! My eyebrows are much fuller and I barely have to fill them in.

title: Worth a try!
body: I bought this to see if I could increase the thickness of my hair. Although I don’t see a huge difference, I have had people comment that my hair looks thicker and healthier. What I have noticed is a HUGE decrease in the amount of hair I lose, especially in the shower. For the price I think it’s totally worth it. I try to remember to put it on before bed. Depending on how much I use determines if it looks a little greasy or not. If I know I’m washing my hair the next day I use a little extra so I don’t really care if it looks slightly greasy when I wake up. I also use a few drops before styling and it’s not noticeable. Will definitely keep using.

title: Recommended!!
body: I was using this product to treat what I believe to be the early stages of hair loss. While using it I didn't really notice any difference, my hair seemed to be alright however, once I stopped, my hair began falling out a bit again. This product seems to work for me as a preventative to hair loss, this isn't scientific but I recommend it.

title: AMAZING!
body: Used this product for two weeks and I have seen the difference already. Not greasy and not heavy on your scalp.

I’ve only been using about a week and I had to come write a review...obviously it’s too soon to see anything hair growth or density but I’ve noticed a HUGE difference in the amount of hair that falls out throughout the day (zero) and the tiny amount that comes out during showers which is very minimal. I used to her handfuls in the shower. Also running my hands through my hair throughout the day I would notice hair all over my desk. It’s amazing!

title: Wouldn’t Recommended
body: I had high hopes that this product would work as described however after trying this product every second night for a week I was left with a burning scalp -- yet I used the recommended 4-5 drops. I usually do not have any issues with my scalp being sensitive but this product was not for me.

title: I was skeptical... but!
body: I bought this despite the bad reviews because I was really hoping this would help me. But after a few weeks of use, I can say the reviews were right. This makes my scalp look greasy immediately, you also have to apply it daily as it doesn’t last. I thought I could use it as a treatment but it says on the bottle that you need to wear it throughout the day.

Not going to lie, I bought this out of desperation not thinking it would work. To preface, I have thick, coarse, wavy hair that I always tie in a bun for work. That being said, I’ve been noticing where my part meets my forehead is starting to thin due to years of hair tugging from my bun. I apply this at night and in the morning my hair isn’t greasy (but it is super thick hair, so that might help. Thinner, less coarse hair may notice some grease). After a couple weeks I am noticing that my little “balding” spot looks much less noticeable! For this price, it’s fantastic!

I'm not really sure if it's growing my hair back but I actually bought it to rehydrate my scalp after shampooing as I've been having very dry, flakey scalp during winter. it says to apply it on dry hair but I prefer towel dried, damp hair to help massage it into my scalp. so far it's helping a bit if I am able to spread it evenly.

Been using for two weeks. While I can’t say it’s doing anything for growth or density, my scalp is in great shape. Dry, flakey patches on my temples are gone. I’ve tried various products over the years, which often were smelly or made my hair greasy. This is neither. My scalp is just...normal. If you have a patchy scalp I recommend.

I’m not sure if this is actually keeping me from losing more hair, BUT I will say it’s helping it grow back. I had/have a lot of thinning at the temples and I’m noticing a lot more hair there than before. I’m still losing hair which is a bummer, but I think this helps. I’m at the end of my first bottle and just re-ordered it.

title: Great Product!
body: It has been 2 weeks, I apply it everyday night. Doesn’t see much difference yet, but hair fall has decreased little bit. The good thing about it is I can wear it every night and since it’s non greasy I don’t have to wash hair every day. I haven’t used straightener yet on my hair since I started using this product, because my hair are less frizzy and I have naturally straight hair so It’s a plus. I’m hoping for something really good in few months. I will update the results here.

title: Too early to notice hair growth but will repurchas
body: After only 2 weeks of use, I would say my hair seems to be much healthier and fuller already. I use a few drops on different sections of my scalp at night and massage it in. When I wake up in the morning my hair is silkier and fuller. I have fine hair and this product actually makes my hair look denser and lifted. I believe healthy hair starts with a healthy scalp and I hope with continued use my hair will become thicker over time. Definitely recommend this stuff!!!

title: broken :(
body: Too early to notice any hair growth because its been a week only. i used to have full head of curly hair until my mid twenties but after that i started losing hair crazy and now i have bald areas that scare me to death. i bought multi peptide serum i am not expecting any hair growth as most reviews say. however i know i am going to repurchase because the illusion it creates is incredible. it adds volume at the roots and make hair LOOK fuller. Attaching two comparison photos. you can see how my hair looks flat in first photo where as in second photo it looks a bit more thicker. ( second photo os taken after two applications of the serum) i hope it helps someone in need!

title: Beauties, stay tuned...
body: The dropper was broken on mine so unfortunately can’t effectively use the product.

I bought 3 of these. One for y nonexistent brows, one for my hair, and a back up. I haven't used it in my hair yet. I need to be able to try it and then have time to wash it out if it makes my hair look greasy, so stay tune. I will let you know: 1) if it works 2) If it makes my hair greasy. I have been using it on my nonexistent brows for a week. I will let you know if they grow and how long it takes to notice. So, my beauties, stay tuned.....

title: Yup.
body: Actually works (give it a few months), and doesn't make my hair greasy like other hair serums I've tried.

title: Happy I bought
body: Im so thankful for this product. I thought it wasn’t going to work but I have noticed my edges are growing back. My hair looks so much fuller now I’m just happy I actually found something that works for me for once !

title: Lives up to the claims!
body: Love. The product only claims to help hair density, as opposed to growth, but I totally notice new baby hairs around my hairline which is where I use the treatment. I use in conjunction with alterna caviar root treatment. It does exactly what it claims and I was very pleased it did not leave my hair oily or greasy, nor did I have to wash my hair sooner than without the treatment. I came here to repurchase and thought I’d leave a review. I tend to opt for brands like tatcha, skii, amorepacific etc... but I’ve recently incorporated a handful of The Ordinary products in my complicated skincare routine and I am HIGHLY impressed with the brand. It does everything it claims to do. Good quality. I’ve been able to swap out pricier items in my routine with The Ordinary products. I trust the brands integrity of product. Would recommend.

title: no difference...
body: Haven’t used it consistently enough to notice fullness but definitely has made my hair grow longer faster I used to plateau around my collar bone but now my hair is halfway down my back. Also noticed a huge improvement in my nail growth and strength as I rub it into my scalp and then whatever is left I rub into my nails/cuticles.

title: amazing! really works! looks at the pics!
body: I have been using this product for a few months now and have not noticed any significant changes in the direction I am hoping for. I have thin hair that seems to have gotten less dense over the past few years. My scalp shows through much of the time unless my hair is freshly washed and blow dried. I still have high hopes for this product but unfortunately I have not yet seen any results.

100% yessssss I’ve gone through 2 bottles already! I can see the difference! (I didn’t see much until I finished it first one) but now I do! My hair is fuller at the top! Here are the photos before and after! 100% recommend !

title: My hairdresser even noticed regrowth
body: Run don’t walk! Noticeable results in 3 months. Less shedding. My hairdresser even noticed all the new baby hairs coming in (unsolicited). Be patient and be consistent and it will help. Also, so we’ll priced as per usual for The Ordinary.

title: Love
body: Love this. My hair takes forever to grow and I was hesitant to use it at first, worried that it would be too oily. I finally pulled the plug and massaged this into my scalp for 4 straight nights. Mind you, I only wash my hair every 7-10days and i use a scalp brush in the shower to promote blood circulation to the scalp. My hair grew an inch. I kick myself for not taking a before pic of my hair. I would absolutely recommend it and will continue to purchase for myself and family&friends

title: Works Magic!
body: This product actually works. I have been a few drops regularly, and I have noticed my roots are starting to grow in thicker. I have been losing hair for years now and this is god sent. Be patient as this product does take 4-6 weeks to start noticing a difference. Would definitely buy again!

title: try this on eyebrows! it for real works!
body: I’ve been using consistently as directed for about four months. I have perimenopausal hair thinning along my part, especially at the front of my head. This serum hasn’t done anything for me - no change. I can’t recommend.

I have horribly thin hair and originally bought this for that reason. I’ve been using it on my hair when I remember for a month, and I can see some improvement. But I had the idea of putting it on my eyebrows (also extremely this and light), and WOW!!! A few days in, my eyebrows felt thicker and seemed to have a normal amount of hair. I’m at the point now where I only fill in my brows when I do full make up (I used to fill them in anytime I left my house).
When I was using this, my usual hair fall reduced by 80%. I’m going to repurchase

title: Patience pays off!
body: Couldn’t be happier. Let me start off by saying this will only help with hormonal hair loss. You have to be consistent and patient, but this absolutely works. I would honestly say give it 8 weeks to work. You don’t need to use a lot, and use it before you go to bed but it’s totally fixed my hairline that got all messed up from hormones that went out of whack!

title: not bad
body: I haven’t used this product long enough but so far it makes my hair thick when I put it on. Even my husband likes it. He has a very dry scalp and this actually helps him.

title: REALLY GREAT FOR HAIR
body: This is an amazing product and so different than how you think it will leave your hair. Does make it fuller and thicker.

title: Good serum, no the peptides don’t cause migraines
body: I made it a point to come here and review, and I never do this, even for products I consistently repurchase. My hair has never been this long. I got a cut in September, and I can’t go a day without people commenting on the length and volume in my hair. It sheds so much less, I see new sprouts, and it’s just so long and full—down to my low back! And the longest I’ve ever had it is maybe hitting my bra strap. Can’t guarantee it will help everyone, but it definitely is worth a try at that price. In addition to this, I use a detoxifying shampoo once a week, and shampoo maybe 3-4x a week. I don’t leave this on very long, and I do it before I shower because it doesn’t look clean if I do it on my clean hair. Haven’t tried it on wet clean hair yet, but I already see results and I still have 1/3 of the bottle left.

I’ve been using this serum for about a month now and I’ve just started to notice my baby hairs growing a little longer. My hair definitely feels denser, too. The serum is quite watery so it doesn’t grease up the hair too much. Dropper works well. As far as other people claiming the peptides are causing their migraines; there’s pretty much no chance it’s the peptides because the ones in this serum are from a different class than the peptides that MAY cause migraines. It’s most likely the caffeine, if anything, that could be triggering your migraines, although that’s still unlikely (not impossible) unless you’re microneedling your scalp before applying. Otherwise, the absorption will stay mainly in the skin/follicles.

Only been using for about two months , but noticing my hairline is more defined , my hair doesn’t get greasy as fast now and I did notice my nails growing faster maybe because I massage it in with my hands . Overall good price and will continue to use for what it’s doing !

title: Does Nothing
body: Used two bottles and saw nothing, nada, zip. No change in scalp or hair thickness. May as well have just put water on my scalp. Really wanted it to work, hence why I bought a second bottle.

title: headaches galore
body: I haven't used this product enough to see if it actually works but it is giving me a ridiculous headache which I saw another reviewer had a problem with also. I never get headaches and this is bothering me a ton

title: Don't waste your money
body: Haven't noticed any difference in my hair density, makes me break out on my forehead near my hairline, and dries weirdly on my scalp in a way that looks like dandruff when it flakes off.

title: Works for Me
body: My hair is fine and beginning to thin at the temple. I've used this serum for about 6 months and it does appear to add volume and stopped any further thinning. It feels clean and leaves no residue.

title: Helped to reduce hair fall!!!
body: I bought this to see if this would help with my thinning hair. I'm 44 yrs old and have been experiencing more hair fall in the past 5 years. I've been using this product for about a month (4-5 days a week) and, I have to say, my hair does look fuller and shinier. Also, most notably, is I have about a third less hair fallout than before. I lose a lot of hair when I shower and I would have to pick up so much hair from the strainer in my bathtub drain. But now, I barely have anything to retrieve. I would give this product more stars if I could! It definitely works for me!

I’m on my second bottle and boy has this stuff truly helped to create a clean and nutritious environment for hair to thrive. I have thinning hair at my crown due to hormones and nothing you can buy without a doctor is gonna fix that, BUT this has undoubtedly thickened the appearance and FEEL(!) of my hair. I’m honestly frightened to think what my scalp would look like without it. Once again The Ordinary is offering very effective products at reasonable prices and this is one. Whether you just wanna thicken up your hair, improve your scalps health, or encourage new growth this is something that needs to be in your routine.

title: So far so good!
body: While I've only used this for a little over 2 weeks, I'm already impressed by the amount of life and volume its brought back to my hair. It looks like I have the start of some regrowth in the thinning section of my hair as well! I use about a half to a dropper full every night and I haven't had a problem yet! I give it 4 stars just because the dropper method for application is a bit of pain with a fluid so watery.

title: It really works!
body: I have toons of growing baby hair. Using this over a month I’m obsessed! And not only me, my husband and one friend that has bald patches their hair is growing and re growing! I will keep using. I’m 42, my husband 44. So yeiiiiii for us

title: makes your hair look thicker
body: I have long medium/fine 3a curly dark hair. This made my hair look a lot fuller and healthier. I use it on my scalp before using my other products. My blowout looks fuller and bouncier. I don’t know if this is going to make my hair grow in fuller, I use castor oil masks for that- but my hair strands look a lot thicker and I love it! Highly recommend for thin hair.

title: Made things worse
body: I have no idea why this has such glowing reviews. I wish it worked for me but it didn't. I used it pretty regularly for 3 weeks and I actually lost more hair after introducing this product to my hair care routine. I don't know why, and I don't understand how it worked for everyone else, my scalp is now wider than when I started. Also, be careful if you are sensitive to caffeine. I was having increased heart rate at night and I couldn't figure out why until I watched a youtube review on it and learned that caffeine is pretty high on the ingredient list. If you drink coffee and you're used to it then it shouldn't be a problem for you, but if you're sensitive to caffeine then it's a small side effect that may or may not happen to you.

title: finally, something that works!!!
body: I have been using this over a month now and I'm not much of a big 'observer' but every time I brush my fingers through my hair it feels a lot thicker and has more volume that it ever did before! I've also been having so much hair growth too which is magnificent! My hair has been generally healthier than ever!!
I see hair growth on my forehead! But don’t use it on your lashes, it irritates the eyes. Very recommended for ppl who wants to grow hair.

title: Keep looking
body: I really had some, not high but just some hopes for it but i didnt notice ANY difference at all. Plus the bottle is so small that you go through it too fast. I would look for another product.

title: WowOhWow!
body: great product. i can see the result immediately after a few times using it (4-5 times in 2 weeks). i did not realize until i touched my hair to tie it up. i have tried many other products but none of them helped. highly recommend !!!

title: worth the wait
body: I have no complaints regarding this product. My hair is loc’d, considered 4C (coily) and long down to the middle of back. Like many, I have thinner edges which I hate. I purposefully used this product on my edges and in the middle of hair to encourage growth and thickness and yes, it worked. I purchased on 10/14 and did not use that same day, however, today is 11/7 and I can significantly change. My edges and hair atop my head is thicker and growing. This product works so fast; I only hope there are no adverse effects.

title: Great for limiting hair loss from scalp irritation
body: Huge difference for me, I’m loving it!!! I’ve being using for 3 months now and my fall reduced and I’m starting to grow hair again.

Great hair serum! What you need to remember is this will take a month or two of constant use to notice results. Right away after stating using my hair didn’t get oily as fast ( typically wash my hair every 5 days) and softness improves. 3 months in my hair does feel denser and I have new hair growth

So far so good. After moving to a dry climate my scalp was getting dry and causing my hair to shed more than normal. I have been using this every other night and I am finding that I have less shedding. Still early days to comment on thickness and regrowth.

title: Love this serum!
body: I don't know if I am growing hairs as it is too soon to tell but I am noticing that my hair does appear to have more volume. My stubborn double crown is now mostly covered! My hair feels softer and looks shinier at the roots. The serum feels light and a little oily upon application but dries and leaves no greasy residue. My scalp feels healthy and the serum really does keep flakes at bay. Best of all the price is inexpensive so I will keep using it to see how my hair grows.

title: Loved after first use
body: I never write reviews but I loved this so much after the first use I decided I would write one. I was skeptical that this would not make my hair look greasy even though many reviews said this, just because my hair tends to get oily very fast. I used this for the first time last night, applying it right after the shower and let my hair air dry. At first, I felt some residue on my scalp while my hair was still damp, but as much hair continued to dry I no longer felt any residue which means the product sunk in very fast. After my hair was fully dry my scalp was not oily at all and my hair felt great. When I let my hair dry it tends to get very frizzy, but my hair is silky and smooth and my natural waves look great. I also felt that my roots had a little more volume than usual. Although I don't know if this product works for its exact purpose yet I love how it makes my hair feel and look, so if it helps make my hair grow thicker and longer this would be an added bonus.

title: Trade off between good hair and splitting headache
body: Like the texture like water. Not sticky. I bought a second bottle. I will keep using this. My hair density looks better now.

I bought this stuff with high expectations and while it made my hair more manageable and my hairline noticeably denser, the splitting headaches I noticed after using it are so not worth it. This should come with a warning label. I stopped using it and my head doesn’t feel like it’s being crushed like a can first thing in the morning.

title: it works.
body: I used this back when I first purchased it, then quick when I was packing to move states. I noticed I significant difference in the fullness of my hair, as well as how quickly my hair grew. It already grow fast but this made my pixie cut grow out in no time. Started using it again last week. I like to apply it at nighttime, either right after I shower ( I notice it doesn’t make my hair greasy then) or when I don’t shower but I know I’m gonna be home the next day and it doesn’t matter what my hair looks like and I’ll wash it the next night. Be sure to really rub it into your scalp. Like a nice massage. Feels good, stimulates blood flow and works the product in well. I was a little unsure about it initially because of the reviews but I’m really glad I tried it.

title: Great for postpartum hair loss
body: I got this to help with bad postpartum hair loss around my hairline. I use it every night in combination with hair vitamins. I'm very impressed with the results so far. Seems to work quickly. Totally worth it!

title: Worth trying for hair fall and dandruff
body: I have naturally thin hair but since using a dropper every night my hair is more hydrated and feels less brittle. I only wash my hair every 4 days and I’ve noticed I don’t look as ‘lived in’ by day 4 anymore!

title: Will continue to use.
body: When I read the reviews I thought too good to be true. But price wasn't that expensive. Soo I gave it a shot. And with in a month I saw results. My dandruff has significantly reduced and soo is my hair fall. I have got my hubby hooked on to this product now. And waiting for the same results for him as well it's just a week since he has started using this serum. And please the makers should change the dropper kinda bottle it's very inconvenient. I have transferred this liquid in to a travel size sprayer which makes it much easy to use. I would highly recommend this serum to each and everyone.

I have used this serum for about a month. It is runny but I was prepared to be careful after reading the reviews. I use a dropper full in the AM after showering and rub into my scalp on the top of my head. It does soothe itchiness for me so that's a plus. I do notice a slight thickness to my fine strands of hair and it doesn't make my hair greasy if I just use a dropper full. I use more at night, when I'm going to shower the next day, before bed and slick back my hair. Overall, I'm happy with this serum and will stick with it, especially since the price is so reasonable.

I almost finished my first bottle and will purchase it again, I noticed my front hairline grown more and stronger. I definitely recommended this product and it's cheap too compared to the brand Phyto.

title: AMAZING
body: LOVE THIS STUFF. I’m shocked at how thick my hair looks after applying, plus it makes my styling last a day longer! I have curly hair, and it’s a mess to try and find something that will thicken your hair that’s also CGM approved. This stuff is great! Even my mom noticed my thicker hair and asked what I have been using!

title: seems to work so far
body: Giving it 4 stars for now as an initial review. I've been using this for a week and a half. I've been shedding a little more than usual for the past few months, to the point where I had a spot that I was concerned about. I feel like that spot has been filling up with more hair. I will continue to use the product to see how much of difference it really makes. Will update the review in a couple months.

title: Gave long-lasting OOMPH to my baby fine hair.
body: I have always been skeptical of hair products because everything I’ve tried for my super fine hair has either been useless or had some weird down side to it. I bought this recently and used it the first night it came in, right after I took a shower. As my hair dried, my hair had way more volume than it ever has. My fiancé even noticed how full it looked compared to usual (and you know men never notice things like that, let’s be real) When I first saw and felt the formula, I expected it to make my hair oily but it didn’t at all. I actually didn’t wash my hair for a couple days afterwards and my hair kept the oomph the whole time and actually seemed to produce less oil than it normally would. I am very satisfied with this product, especially at the price point. Definitely worth the money. I will be repurchasing this when I run out, and most likely trying more products by this brand - both for hair and skincare.

title: Best for normal or dry hair
body: I suffer from dandruff and also oily hair (a horrible combo), and while this did do wonders for getting rid of my dandruff, it turned my hair into a grease factory! I would only recommend for normal or dry hair.

title: interesting
body: It works. On my third bottle. Not extreme but noticeable difference. If I put on my temples and pet at night, I don’t wake up with oily hair/ scalp.
I apply this every night before bed and after two weeks I noticed little bits of hair growing on the sides of my hair and it makes my hair less greasy !

title: This is working
body: I was reluctant at first, but after about a month I do see a difference. I will definitely get another bottle once I finish this one.

title: great for dry scalp!
body: I have no problem with hair density but my dry scalp and flaky dandruff was a nightmare. Ive tried to use all kind of dandruff shampoo but nothing worked well. Things started to get a lot better since i use this serum. Ive only used 1/3 of the bottle so far but I have seen great improvement in regards to dandruff.

title: Major fail
body: Didn’t do anything for me. Don’t waste your money.

title: Noticeable difference on thinning hair
body: I am now on my 2nd bottle; I actually put it to a test. When I first bought it from the deciem store, after a week I started to notice my hair looked fuller and voluminous, yet I was still unsure if it was the hair peptide working. Anyway, so I kept using it until the bottle ended, then I decided not to purchase another one and had nothing applied to my hair. Within a week i noticed my hair went flat, with no thickness. So this proves that although it did not generate new hair growth (which it doesn’t claim to do so) the product actually worked by thickening the hair shaft making it look like a full head of hair. Throughout this test I stuck to the same shampoo/no dietary changes and did not apply any other products in my hair. So I know that this peptide worked and that’s why I bought it again. Side note: I have had hair loss/thinning hair since my 20s and so I highly recommend this product to those suffering with hair loss/thinning. So far haven’t had any adverse effects.

title: Don’t waste your money
body: This felt horrible on my hair, it made it sticky and not good. I used it once and won’t use it again:

No idea how this works. It seems like it helps plump up hair or just make it fall differently. I have tried products for fuller hair and it always looks like straw. This stuff just gives fuller silky hair, like you grew more hair. For reference, before I used this stuff, I would avoid pony tails as they took 4 wraps of an elastic and looked anemic and thin. This morning I did a pony tail and it took 3 wraps and the hair looks full and wavy. For non ponytail tail days, my hair used to be limp and thin looking, now it is thick and wavy. No idea how it works- logically I know in the past month I have not grown new hair. I imagine it somehow coats the hair to thicken it, but without dulling it. At any rate, this is an awesome product.

title: Could this be?!
body: Two weeks in and I already notice a difference! Wowza! Could just be my skin and body chemistry, but this works. I’ve been suffering from postpartum hair loss and lack of vibrancy. Since I started applying this serum at night with a little scalp massage I’ve noticed a huge difference in the health and density of my hair. I normally shy away from anything that promises to turn my hair world upside down, but this serum has done it! Highly recommend.

title: Not the solution for my hair problems
body: I really wanted to like this hair serum, but it didn't do anything for me; I was so stubborn, I actually used the whole bottle (lasted me months), but I only got slightly greasier hair than usual. I have thin hair and a dry/itchy scalp that easily get irritated and develops dandruff. But what attracted me most was the idea of peptides for hair (I love them for my skincare). I was due diligent in applying the serum every night, spending some time to gentle massage it into my scalp. But results failed to appear; my hair didn't grow faster or thicker, my scalp was as usual (but slightly more greasy), my volume and hair loss was the same. I don't necessarily think is a bad product and I do believe it might give some other people results; but it isn't the solution for my issues. I had no problem with the dropper system to dispense the solution. But I do recommend people to tilt the head back when applying it; I wasn't careful at first, so product migrated to my forehead and it gave me some odd breakouts.

title: It works but...
body: I wanted to like this product, but I agree with the other negative reviews. This serum did nothing more than irritate my scalp. I would apply before bed and the next morning my hairline was red and itchy. I don't necessarily have sensitive skin but this simply didn't work for me. Every other product I've tried from The Ordinary has been awesome, but this one missed the mark.

title: if you have dry scalp don’t hesitate to get this!
body: Between the dog and I, dont know who's shedding more. i bought this product because of all the good reviews. after the first week of using this, it definitely work! I noticed my hair isn't falling off as much as it used it and it does looks thicker and fuller. However, it does makes my scalp dried and a little itchy.

I honestly RARELY write reviews but you need to know about this product if you have dandruff/dry scalp!!! I use it every night on nights I don’t wash my hair. I use one of those rubber scalp massaging shampoo brushes to work it into my scalp and it has worked like a dream! I used to get dry patches around my hairline and if I didn’t wash my hair I’d get a flaky scalp within a day or two. Ugh it was awful! I haven’t had to use a dandruff shampoo in 3 months now and that’s also made my color treated hair be able to hold color much longer! My HOLY GRAIL!

I just started using this serum with the hopes that it will help my fine, straight hair from breaking around my hairline. It’s only been a week, so I can’t see a difference in the breakage yet, but it leaves my usually flat hair more bouncy, and more shiny. So far I love this product.

title: Hair and Nails!!!
body: It works but you have to be consistent- love that it doesn’t leave behind any reside or greasiness.

title: It worked for me :)
body: I don’t know if it really helped with my hair density, but I bought it based on the reviews of how it fixes dandruff, and it really does!!! After I wash my hair I apply the serum to my scalp before using a hair dryer, works like a miracle!

title: I had high hopes
body: It works!! New baby hairs after consistent use for a month. Plus strange coincidence. But I have strong long fingernails for the first time in 50 years young. Makes sense because nails and hair are the same so why not? My nails come in contact with it every time I use it. No other explanation. It awesome. Won’t make hair greasy if used properly on your scalp only.
Loving it so far! Using it almost for a month and I’m already seeing results. I also use it on my eyebrow and they are actually growing! I would definitely recommend to try it.
I'm giving two stars since this did not damage my hair. Used for months, no significant difference at any point in time. Disappointed and confused.
I'm not sure if this stuff actually is thickening my hair, but it definitely looks thicker after applying it. I also feel like it keeps my hair cleaner longer? Either way. I like it.

title: Doesn’t work
body: I’ve been using this for a few months now, and I see zero difference. I have fine, wavy hair, and I shed a good amount. My hair is getting a little thinner now that I’m in my 40s, but this is not doing anything for it. I had high hopes for it. So sad.

title: I think this may work!
body: I have only used this about 10 days but from the start, there was about half the amount of hair in the drain as normal before I started using this at night. I don't know yet if hair is actually filling in some thin spots on the crown of my head but I am very hopeful.

title: Apply after washing your hair! This stuff works
body: Use this on your scalp right after washing your hair, massage through, then brush with a detangling comb! It doesn't leave any greasy residue whatsoever if you apply it while your hair is wet. I love this stuff - I have random baby hairs I didn't have before, my part looks a lot fuller and hair grows quicker. I don't know how this works but somehow it makes my hair look instantly thicker. It's lot less messy than castor oil and the price is good. On to my second bottle!

title: Not a fan
body: Good price, but it weighed my hair down, felt greasy, and just didn't work as well as the product I was trying to replace, Revivhair Max. I like a lot of The Ordinary products, but I guess sometimes you pay more and get more.

title: Peach fuzz is a good start.
body: First off, I am not exactly using this product the way The Ordinary intended. My scalp is fine, it’s my eyebrows that are getting sparse, particularly in the area above my nose between them. The bottle says use at night, which is what I’m doing. After a month I am seeing some new growth. It’s “peach fuzz” at this point, but it’s there. With continued use I hope it gets darker and thicker. I would love to not have to pencil in half my brows. Will report back in the future.

I absolutely love this stuff! Started to see results (brand new baby hairs on my hairline) at only 4 weeks in. I’m now on my second bottle and have been using this for two or three months. I apply it 3 nights a week, only in the spots that I need it, and then apply black castor oil to the same spots 2 nights a week. I’m non-binary trans and I’m on testosterone shots. I also have autoimmune disorders— both of these contribute to my hair loss and hair thinning. This stuff has been a confidence-saver for me! My hair line is finally starting to look full again. Highly recommend this to every adult who is struggling with hair loss, for whatever reason(s).

title: Inexpensive and works!!
body: This product is amazing!!! I saw a review for the brand on Cityline, discussing how this brand lets their ingredients speak for itself, rather than the packaging. It really does!! In less than a month I’ve already seen drastic results!! It does leave a bit of an oily residue, but if you leave it in overnight, when you wake up it’ll be gone and absorbed in! Pictured is 1) before I started using the product, 2) 1 week after using it, and 3) 3 weeks after using it.

title: Really Works
body: I have used this product for a week now and it has lifted my roots and it has made my roots look fuller. I love The Ordinary’s line of products.

title: Very happy with this product!
body: So impressed by this serum! I am almost through a whole bottle and my hair is growing! The results are surprisingly pretty quick. By week 2 I could already see new hairs growing.

title: I wanted to love it..
body: I love The Ordinary and use many of the facial skin products, so I thought I'd love this too, but this fell short for me. I have very thin, sparse hair that is also oily. So this caused my hair to be even oilier, which shows off my scalp even more. I wash my hair at night and use this on dry hair before I go to bed-- just to wake up with slick hair. I'll sadly be returning this.

I have used this for a couple weeks now. I am not quite sure how much it has done for me, although my hair has been feeling more smooth and shiny. I have very thin hair that lays pretty flat and so I haven't really noticed a difference volume/thickness wise. It goes on pretty oily but overnight it soaks in and it's completely dry in the morning.

title: Not much difference
body: I used this for a month and saw absolutely no difference in my hair. It did provide a little more moisture but beyond that I saw no difference in the thickness or a decrease in hair loss.

title: MUST READ!!!! Do not buy this!!!!!!
body: I honestly have no clue why this product has so many good reviews. I used it for maybe 3 weeks until I absolutely had to stop. Was hoping to thicken the hair around my hairline but this did the complete opposite. It killed my hair follicles and made my hair line even thinner than it was to begin with. In one spot it actually made my hair fall out, and I now have clear very thin/bald spots where hair once was. So disappointed and upset with this product and wouldn't even recommend this to my worst enemy!!! Im so upset and self conscious about the results from using this serum. STAY AWAY

title: Magical
body: I’m almost done with my first bottle, and I’ll be buying another. This is not a quick fix, because hair takes time to grow, but it definitely does work. I had significant bald spots in my naturally thin hair and even my hair stylist is noticing the new growth and new fullness and body. I use a dropper full every night. The dropper makes it easy to get directlybon the scalp, which is so much easier than the product I tried previously (Senegence Haircovery Serum).

title: small changes
body: I am shocked frankly at how well this is working. I have a lot of very curly and dry hair. I have been feeling that I am losing quantity, luster, and thickness over the last year or so; my once full thicker hair has been lifeless. I have been using this oil for just over a week (about every other evening before I go to bed), and I already notice a difference. I have more shine, less dryness, and somehow I magically feel thicker already. My expectations were low, but within a week I noticed a change. YAY!

title: THIS STUFF IS MAGIC
body: My hair is recovering from being bleached, and there was serious breakage happening. Though my hair still breaks a bit at the ends, since using this my strands have gotten stronger and thicker. I can't speak to long-term results but the last three weeks have seen a small change in my hair.

HOLY OMG. I have a zillion Sephora products I love and don't ever take the time to review, including a shelf full of The Ordinary serums and acids (which I could sing praises about from the mountaintops as well). Story: When I switched my birth control about a year ago, I had crazy volume loss with strands coming out in clumps (to the point I was afraid to comb/brush) and tons of breakage around the front. I've had such success with other TO products, I thought why not give this a try and started using it 3-4 times a week about a month and a half ago. Early on, I noticed this stuff was WORKING. Like major THICK baby hair floof coming in in the front, less scalp showing when up in a pony, and a density I have never felt before, as my hair's fine to begin with. I just got home from a hair appointment and my girl was MINDBLOWN how much new growth I had. And I don't mean growth in the length sense (though it certainly has with this), I mean I had NEW baby hairs coming in all over my head! What product does that!? I promise you no hair-skin-nails gummie or overpriced treatment, for sure, because I've tried. I've also been using it on my sparse brows and lashes (which were short after having worn extensions for a few years), and I can say it's making a difference. Seriously, seriously, seriously... go buy this right now!

title: SOLID GOLD
body: This stuff has really worked for me. It's helping the high naked spots on the top corners of my face grow back in .....yes, really!........and filling in my front hairline so that I can't see the curve of my scalp under the hair when I push my hair back from my face. Solid GOLD. It's a little sticky, so what? It's chesap, and it WORKS!

title: magic
body: freaking magical. I was losing so much hair as a result of my thyroid and this really came through in rebuilding by thinning hair line (after the adjustment of my meds, which stopped the continuous fall out of course. but it wasnt going to regrow what i had lost.) i was able to regain a lot of fullness in the front within literally two weeks of using this. my hair just looks less thin. this stuff is AMAZING. I use it very generously at night and my hair doesnt look greasy in the morning. I dont find it to have any significant scent. i brush my hair for a good minute after using this because massaging your scalp alongside it is said to make it work better. looooove it so much.

title: Must have!
body: Fact 1: this is my first ever The Ordinary product. Fact 2: it does exactly what it says and some more! Just in 1 week of applying 1-pipet worth every night and very gently rubbing it into my scalp, my hair fall has reduced to less than half. The regrowth and/or density benefits will probably take longer to show but the hair fall has really dropped and I am positive it'll only get better. Note: I don't have perennial nor medical/hormonal type of hair fall but what I suspect, humidity related. I have recently moved to the lakeside and it's hot. For the price, it's definitely worth giving it a go. It'll only improve your hair/scalp health.

title: Great scalp treatment!
body: Love this stuff! I use it as directed on my boyfriend each night, he has thick hair so no difference there buuut it’s completely healed his dry/itchy scalp and bad dandruff! I use it slightly different on myself and rub it onto my scalp while my hairs still wet. I’ve noticed way less hair loss from brushing and throughout the day and it makes my hair so soft and shiny plus no dry/itchy scalp! A little goes along way and this will last quite a long time even with two people using it!

title: Good
body: I'm giving this serum 5 stars because it does what it claims to do. I bought it hoping it would help my hair grow since I've had a lot of hair falling out but it does not help hair growth. The serum doesn't promise growth anywhere but what it does is make your hair look denser and fuller for a few days after application.
No difference at all. I’ve used this a few times a week, ever since purchasing it and I really don’t see any difference. I don’t have a densely packed scalp therefore I was hoping to see some growth.
It works!

title: LOVE IT
body: Within 3 days of using this product, I had noticeably less hair loss. Normally, I would lose a handful of hair each time I showered. I lost about 1/3 less than normal. When I brushed my hair the loss was reduced as well. I used this product about 10 times over the last month. I bought it because I was getting a widow's peak. Peak no more! It really works.

title: This stuff works!
body: I seriously never write reviews but I do read lots of reviews before I try any product, especially products for my hair. Due to a combination of genes, nutrition, prolong stress, and carelessness I have been losing my already thin hair by the handful everyday. I tried tons of products that claimed to prevent hair loss and did my best to cover it up. I was experiencing psychological distress when my husband started to make comments on the condition of my hair because since I known him he has always admired woman’s hair. When my scalp started showing despite my usual tricks I started to become antisocial. For the last few weeks I have made some drastic changes in my life to save my hair and this product was one of them, I have seen improvements that has saved my marriage and my sanity. I use this product religiously with a soft scalp massager at night. I also use the scalp messager in the shower with Nizoral shampoo. I use a biotin serum mid shaft and ends and a keratin serum to calm the fly aways from hair Rituals. I take collagen in my coffee and as far as vitamins I take zinc, iron, saw palmetto, and folic acid. I also drink bone broth at night with turmeric and black pepper, and at lunch I drink water with some fulvic mineral complex. I see new growth and less scalp, I have more confidence, and I actually started taking pictures again. I hope this post helps someone who was where I was a few months back, stick with this product for a while because it really really works.
I think this has actually thickened my hair and stopped it from falling out. I know its supposed to increase the "appearance: of volume but in my case its actually changed my hair density

Amazing, Amazing, I been using it for a week from the first couple of days I notice almost no hair falling in the shower ( it was crazy I was clogging the shower almost every couple of weeks) same with the hair brush less than half of the crazy daily cleaning the brush full of hair, and softer more volume healthier hair, and now after a week no hair at all in the shower and 4 hairs or non on my hair brush plus the carpet of hair that I was picking up of my bathroom floor constantly no more for a week since I started no hair on the floor, also I see an improvement in hair density and hair growth and a fuller hair line, I look up the ingredients and all of them amazing for hair loss, growth, density, hair health, also mostly from natural and very clean safe ingredients and just a few close to it. I have try many treatments from all types of price points some that I can’t even afford with very little improvement and the ordinary hair peptides is the only one that I have seen a big positive difference, I love it so far and soooo happy not loosing my hair and leaving it as a carpet in my bathroom floor, in my hair brushes and my shower drain. I’m excited and can’t wait for at least tree months to pass by using it, obviously consistency is key and to see more and more of the benefits at least a solid 6 month, l was so worry about how mush hair I was loosing and not seen any real difference with topicals and supplement. Thank you The Ordinary this is amazing

After a serious colouring mishap, I left the stylist with chemical burns on my scalp, my scalp was bleeding in multiple locations for months, and I had to keep my hair in a bun, when the wounds finally closed up I kept having horrible dry flakey patches that would appear out of nowhere! I tried so many scalp treatments nothing worked *except* this serum, I bought it on a whim and after only 3 uses it cleared up almost all the flakey itchy scalp issues! I can wear black tops again with out being constantly self-conscious!!!

title: give it a try
body: On my second bottle. Not sure if it’s made a significant difference but my scalp is super healthy and my hair is stronger and healthier than it’s been in years, but that might be to several other products I’ve started using. My hair stylist says there is more growth. I love TO marine Hy serum, nice and light and my skin drinks it up fast, my scalp does the same thing with this hair serum and the texture is similar. title: Nothing Short of a Miracle for Me: Read if Unsure
body: I’m a 32 y/o guy that does his best to take care of my skin. I use fairly basic products and like to think I do a descent job on anti-aging and skincare fronts. Roughly a year ago, my hair began falling out in frightening quantities with no apparent cause. I saw no less than SIX physicians and not one could explain my symptoms. Losing one’s hair is an highly emotional ordeal. I tried literally everything I could get my hands on to stop shedding/loss. This includes biotin supplements, minoxidil (Rogaine), special shampoos and conditioners.... you name it. Nothing, and I mean NOTHING, helped. Finally I neared a point of helpless acceptance. My doctors felt like this was not simply age related male-pattern loss and all other tests like thyroid function came up normal or close to normal. I felt defeated, angry, confused, and concerned. Then, out of the blue, I stumbled upon this product. At the time, I thought, “Why not?” I am so incredibly grateful I gave this a try. Since starting my daily applications of The Ordinary’s product, my hair has essentially completely stopped falling out (I may lose one to two hairs in the shower now as opposed to what looked like dozens previously—and that’s just what I could count). A quick side note, it was normal for me to lose only one or two pieces of hair in the shower prior to this issue; I know everyone is different but for me, losing dozens of pieces of hair was abnormal. My scalp is no longer tender. My hair texture has returned to normal. I do not wake up with a pillow covered in hair. It even looks like my hair is starting to thicken where it was beginning to grow thinner. In short, I genuinely cannot recommend this product enough. It’s non-greasy and has works almost unbelievable well for me. For the price, I HIGHLY recommend this product to anyone experiencing hair shedding/loss/density issues. If you are going though the emotional turmoil of hair issues, please give this a try. I genuinely hope you find it as beneficial.

title: does exactly what it says
body: I just want to preface this by noting this product will only help with what's been lost; i.e. if you've lost hair due to hormonal changes, medication, etc this can help stimulate the hair follicles you already have BUT it will not create *new* hair follicles. I am giving this a 4/5 star review because the delivery of this product leaves a lot to be desired but the product itself is sublime. Since the serum is so runny, I find the dropper method not to be the best and I think packaging similar to DPHue's ACV rinse would've been better (or even a spray bottle). However, I can look past the packaging mishaps because the serum itself is great! I originally picked this up due to some hair thinning near my hairline that's occurred over the past year. So I only apply this product in that area and not my whole scalp as the volume of the rest of my hair is a-okay. Over the course of almost a month, I've noticed the sparseness in my problem areas decreasing (remember, I have hair follicles there already, this serum is *not* creating them for me) and an overall fullness to my hair. Before introducing this product into my routine, I've been only shampooing and conditioning my hair about 2-3 times a week and I have not changed anything while using this serum; therefore, any results I do see I know I can attribute solely to the serum. My hair naturally does not get oily during my "no-wash" days and this serum does not contribute any oiliness either. It's very light weight and dries in my scalp/hair in less than 10 minutes. The only woe of using this serum is that it can the texture of my bangs a little funky if it gets in them. A tip when applying - especially near the hairline - is to tip your head back so that the serum runs down your scalp and not in your face! I included two photos a little over 3 weeks apart to show the progress, but be warned I probably didn't get the hair-part exactly the same in the photos so any visible results might be a little misleading.

title: Hair no longer falling out plus strong nails
body: I had this for awhile before using it. When I first got it, it seemed so watery I didn’t know how I’d get it on my scalp without getting my long hair full of it. I tried it and set it aside, but took it on vacation with me on a whim months later. I figured I’d give it another shot seeing the reviews. I put it somewhere I’d see each night to remember. I just let it slip all over my fingers as it does and run under my fingernails... after all, I thought, aren’t hair oils often good for nails? And I noticed that even though it did get in my hair too as I feared, it didn’t feel bad and I couldn’t tell the next morning. But nor did I see any change in my hair, though my fingertips (particularly a dry thumb) seemed softer. So I just kept on. And one day, two weeks later, I brushed my hair and reached for that little tool Sephora sells to clean out my hairbrush... the tool I need every single time I brush my hair, since for the last eight years or so I’ve been losing a ton of hair (I just turned 40... but I mean seriously, if I ran my hands through my hair in the day I’d wind up holding hair, and lets not even talk about shower drains)! So there I was, ready to clean my brush that night 2 weeks later... and I thought huh, no hair... or more exactly, like four strands in my brush (instead of hardly seeing the brush for all the hair). Oh my, was it working after all I thought, or just some random fluke? Each night since that day, I’ve ensured I work this stuff into my scalp, disregarding the way it goes everywhere, under nails and through hair. I’ve stopped clogging the drain, and barely any hair is on my brush when I brush it. I can run my hands through my hair again!! No more having my clothes covered in hair (for eight years I’ve wondered how I even still had hair as I seemed to shed so much of it). And my nails are naturally long and beautiful too... I no longer wash this stuff off my hands after. My goodness, it’s miraculous tbh, I’ll never go without it now :)

title: Highly recommend!!!!
body: This serum is AMAZING for those who have flakes in their hair due to dry scalp. Flakes no more. This is my new MUST have. Those complaining on how to apply - uh it's not a hair product like gel. It's for your scalp.

I can’t go without this product. So happy that Sephora started carrying it and I hope they never stop. I have thin Asian hair. It tended to get dry AND oily if I didn’t wash daily. Even when I tried to increase the amount of time between washes, my scalp would become extremely itchy and my hair would suffer from breakage. In addition, I would never be able to attain a smidge of volume without blowdrying my hair (also contributing to the dryness). It was a cycle of not treating my hair and scalp well and really feeling the results and not being able to change anything. I saw this on Deciem’s website and gave it a try. I could immediately see the difference in volume the next day. After washing, I let my hair air dry, which would normally give me very flat hair. But after using this product, my hair was lifted at the roots! In addition, I can go without washing daily now. My scalp no longer feels itchy all the time, I don’t have any more dandruff, and my hair looks and feels fuller and healthier. After using this product the evening before, my hair still looks great the next morning (after absorbing everything) and I can just walk out the door without needing a wash or dry shampoo! This product has single handedly normalized the skin on my scalp, and my hair. I’d also like to add that I suffered from some hair loss last year (tension alopecia). I’ve been using this product for 3 months and the baby hairs at my edges are so long now that they look like bangs when my hair is pulled back! I read that lost hair normally takes about a year to fully grow back, so stay patient! Growth is gradual. This product has definitely been helping me.
Love! Love! Love! Have seen major improvements in my hair! My hair appears thicker and longer. Recommend to anyone who has hair growth issues.

It used to be very thick and it looked healthier when I was younger, but now I am in my upper 30's, and it is not as thick and it does not have as much luster as it had in my 20's. Since my hair is dry and curly, I only wash it once a week and because of that, I feel the need to lather, rinse, and repeat often so not only my hair, but so my scalp feels clean. I always have a lot of dry skin from my scalp under my nails and it takes a while for that to go away. All of that being said, from the moment I used this product, somehow my hair did look thicker and fuller. After about a week of use, my hair looks shinier and less dry as well. My scalp is cleaner and I do not have that dry skin (or probably dandruff) under my nails anymore. I've gotten more compliments on my hair and people are asking me what I am doing differently. It does not have a smell and it does not make your hair greasy at all. It's light and dries quickly. It is just the best thing I have used for my hair ever. I recommend this product if your hair is thin,and/or dry, and/or if you have a dry scalp/dandruff. My scalp used to get itchy by the end of the week, and that has also disappeared. This stuff is a dream come true!
