I have thinning hair around my hairline and overall on my head I have lost some hair, although thankfully I am blessed with a lot of hair so it’s only noticeable to me. Anyways, I Purchased this in hopes that it would help correct the problem. The science and thinking behind it is good, they are aiming to increase blood flow and heat on the scalp to stimulate hair follicles. This is very different than many of the products on the market which actually have a cooling impact and further reduce circulation and increase hair loss. Anyways, I have tried it one time so far, and I can tell you that my skin became unbelievably itchy afterwards. I googled the first three ingredients and discovered that one of them is associated with skin irritation and that companies use it because it helps with product delivery into the skin, so I’m guessing that is what caused my itchiness. Even several days later I am still itchy. It did make my scalp greasier the next day. Normally I can go several days between a shampoo but I am feeling quite oily now on day two, so I will probably need to wash with more frequency if I continue to use this, which actually doesn’t help me at all because part of my problem is dry scalp and I try not to shampoo that frequently anyways. Also I found the dropper to be quite slippery and I accidentally dropped it and the glass shattered so now I have to either find a new dropper or just apply with my finger. I can’t tell you if it makes hair more dense or increases follicle activity. If I can tolerate the itchiness, I think I might apply it to just half of my hairline as a test and see if it makes a difference on that half. I am not exaggerating when I say that my head is still itching several days later.

I used this product for a few weeks and it did nothing to my hair except it made my scalp very greasy. I love every other product from The Ordinary but this was a bummer.

I’ve been using this product for two weeks and I’ve already noticed a difference. I recently lost a lot of weight, which is great, but apparently putting that stress on your body can cause hair damage and thinning. My hair was getting really thin in the front to the point you could see my scalp. It was also very oily. Since using this product, the oiliness of my hair has gone down. I can even wash it every two to three days while using dry shampoo which is something I was never able to do. I’d use to have to wash it everyday. Dry shampoo did nothing. I’ve also noticed that my scalp isn’t as visible. I don’t know how it’ll do with long term use but so far I’m happy with the results.

title: REVOLUTIONARY!
body: I have been using this for two weeks now and so far, I like it, however, I do think I need more time to see actual results. For a hair serum, the price isn’t bad!! So I’m recommending it so far!!

title: Holy Grail!!
body: If you want to see results, one word- CONSISTENCY! I used my first bottle (which I got directly from Deciem) nightly on the "widows peaks" areas where I had pretty much NO hair. I noticed tons of new growth by the end of that first bottle and decided to continue! The product is pretty thin and absorbs quickly without leaving greasy feeling (it'd have been a major "no no" as I hair is thin and delicate). All it took is just a few drops! I'm now on my third bottle and my problematic bald looking widows peaks are no more bald! It's even hard to think back to these times. Even my hair stylist noticed the change, the whole front of my head is now much thicker with new growth (already few inch long!) like never before. At this point I reduced my application to 4-5 night a week and planning to continue using this miracle product! :)

It’s not an instant miracle product. It took me 6 months of every other day use to begin to see results. My scalp is no longer irritated and flaky. My hair is definitely thicker. It may also have possibly contributed to increased hair density.

Magical to say the least. I've struggled with dandruff/scalp psoriasis for about 3 years. Plus excessive hair shedding. I tried EVERYTHING with no success. It's been about 2 months since I started using this serum and my scalp is calm and flake free!! Hair shedding has improved dramatically and I have so many new baby hairs. LIFE CHANGER!

What Voodoo is in this product? My hair is typical Asian, which for a year was abused hardcore being bleached white & dyed Purple on a 4 week repeating cycle. So, I was at the point of Hair FEMA: find some products to try to salvage hair or chop it all off to a pixie cut. Also need to note that I am an EXTREME Hair Shedder, for Example: 3 Showers = a fully clogged drain, hair brush has a golf ball size of hairs removed daily, vacuum 1 room apartment - empty bin twice, I do this 2 times a week (no pets). I also have the joy of removing what appears to be 2 hair tracks wrapped around the roller each time after use. My Shedding is down to an unbelievable low amount. My Dandruff is also improved. No itchy scalp & no scalp acne. I use the product at night, I tend to use a dropper full 5 times over the 5 sections of hair/head. I massage it in for a couple minutes. It does feel odd/look greasy for a few minutes but that goes away. Also, no staining my clothes or silk pillowcases. I am a Klutz & let some get in my eyes, no real burning or pain. I am begging Sephora to always carry this product. * Photo is showing my brush hair loss & single shower hair loss. Note: Showered Yesterday & slept with hair in a tight bun (which increases my usual hair loss).

title: not sure how this doesn’t have more stars?
body: The most effective hair growing product I have ever tried! It gave me so much improvement in volume so fast after using less than a forth of a bottle.

title: Try it out
body: This stuff is incredible! I put it around my hairline right before bed and rub it in, then brush my hair. I agree that it should go on at night, since it can make my roots appear oily at first - but when I wake up the next morning the pily appearance is gone, my hair is voluminous and looks great. I’ve had stubborn baby hairs around my face forever that are finally growing out. Couldn’t be happier with this stuff, especially for the price!

title: Meh at best
body: I'm the idiot that decanted this into a travel size container, confused it with my travel glycolic acid toner, and applied this on my face. I didn't realize my mistake until the next morning, but my skin actually looked and felt quite nice! Very plump and bouncy. I'm in no way recommending anyone use this on their face, and I've only used it on my scalp since, but my point is that this product will be great for sensitive and irritated scalps. I feel like I've noticed less hair loss since using this, and a bit more volume at the roots of my curly, fine hair. I'll need to use an entire bottle before my opinion is completely cemented, but so far I'm impressed.

title: good stuff
body: Doesn't do much. Makes my roots super greasy. I get better results from just using jamaican black castor oil massaged into the scalp then washing that out

title: voluminous hair
body: I love this product. I haven’t had the greasiness issue as some have mentioned but I do apply this at night. It is a little tricky to apply at first but now I have a system and it seems to be working. I have regrowth coming in as well as immediate density/ volume. Definitely recommend and excellent price point. I’ve spent so much on similar products that have done nothing so I will be a returning customer.

lve been using this product for about 3 weeks now. The way I use it is by putting a few drops on my hairline before bed. I noticed when you first put it your hair looks wet or greasy (I guess thats why its recommend to use at bedtime), but in the morning its dried and my hair looks voluminous. I havent noticed any hair growth so far but keep in mind these products aren't overnight magic. To see real results you have to wait at least half a year in my opinion. I'd say get it and incorporate it into your bedtime routine because for the price this peptide serum is great!

title: Not seeing any results
body: I am not sure if this really works after 2 weeks of use - still losing the same amt of hair and not really seeing extra growth. Also, the dropper application is so inconvenient. I had to put it in a small spray bottle so I can actually get the liquid throughout my scalp.

title: Only one works
body: I've suffered from hair loss due to anxiety, I've tried tons of products, none works until this one. Began to see forehead hair gain volume after few weeks. It does make hair oily and messy so make sure you apply it at night and wash it next morning before you head out to work.

title: made my hair less oily
body: I just used this for three days. I don't know how it helps for hair density, but it made me A LOT LESS OILY. I used to get very oil overnight even if I just showered at night, but after using this for once, when I wake up in the morning, my hair looks like they just been washed, not oily at all. It's amazing. I don't need to spray dry shampoo!

title: HAIR LINE FULLER!
body: I honestly never write reviews but this product NEEDED one! I have hypothyroidism and around the time I was diagnosed I lost quite a bit of my hair. Ever since my hair line has been very sparse. For reference, I am only 24 years old. Started using this product a week and 1/2 ago, applying at night. My hair line is VISIBLY fuller and I now have hair growth in spots where I which were very sparse. I seriously can't believe it!! This formula also doesn't make your hair greasy and it has no scent! Another plus! I can't wait to see what the results will be with continued use. I have tried so many hair growth products and shampoos and none of them worked like this. Don't hesitate!!! BUY IT!

title: Great stuff
body: I was a skeptic but when I tried this I was amazingly surprised. After just 1 use I noticed a difference in my hair. I was thinning In the front of my head from using relaxers for over 30 years. I did the big chop and noticed how thin my hair was. This is really good stuff. I will continue to use to see what the outcome will be.

I had high hopes for this product but it made my scalp so itchy. I applied it according to the directions and after about 30 minutes my scalp and around my hairline started to get itchy. I rinsed my hair to get the product out. I do love and use alot of facials products from the ordinary but u fortunately I would not recommend this for sensitive skin. My hair is not processed either.

title: Happy Customer
body: Has been my third time applying this on the scalp today. Never thought that I would be writing a review but here I am.... I am not sure if it is just me or... Every time after applying this, my scalp became so itchy and more hair fell out..... Just leave this thing.

title: New bedtime routine!
body: I always had a problem with baby hair sticking straight up around my hair line. I decided to try this scalp serum because I love the ordinary and break out from biotin supplements. I have used this for a week now and results are visible to my eye. I have more volume in the roots and a fuller hair line. I apply this after my hair dries before bed and have no problems with looking oily in the morning. I give it one star off because the formula is a bit runny. If you get close to the hair line, it might run down your forehead.

title: Not Sold
body: This is a great product from The Ordinary line. I always looking for products that can help thicken my hair. I saw this pop up on the Sephora app and I knew I had to try it. I apply it nightly as part of my bedtime routine. it feels nice on my scalp and has helped control dandruff and I am starting to see my hair feel more voluptuous. I love this product and it does not make my hair feel oily or sticky in any way.

title: Great for volume and less shedding!
body: I am surprised to see so many positive reviews. I love The Ordinary, but the consistency of this is 100% liquid and 0% gel. It’s difficult to even apply to your hair without getting some in your eyes or on your face. Unfortunately, I also don’t see any difference in the volume or density of my hair since starting application. This is one product I will skip next time!

I’m on my second bottle of this, and it has helped greatly with the amount of shedding and breakage I used to have. It also gives my fine wavy hair a lot more volume, and no scalp issues from this. As for hair growth, I’m not sure why others say their hair is growing more, that’s not what this product even claims to do ;) maybe they’re experiencing less fallout as well, which is a definite bonus, and with more volume I guess it does feel thicker? Also, no residue from this for me at all. I wash my hair at night, air dry, add this right before I go to bed, and style in the morning. It’s great.

So glad I found this. I’m four months postpartum and experiencing temporary hair loss. I tried to take a biotin supplement, but the one I chose caused severe stomach cramping (never again!), so I searched for something topical. I noticed a difference after the FIRST use: more volume, a calmer scalp, more bounce in my hair. This little jar gave me my confidence back.

title: Hair goals!
body: This stuff is awesome! I have a ton of naturally wavy hair, but it always lacked volume. Since I started using this, my hair is noticeably more voluminous and the waves come through so much fuller. My hair is also growing like CRAZY. Like, my hairdresser was commenting on the difference all through my last appointment. Only downside is that I do find that this product leaves a bit of residue (especially on thin hair), so to avoid looking greasy I use it every other night on the days when I'll be washing my hair the next morning.

title: Dandruff Cure!!
body: I purchased this product a few months ago to see if it could restore my edges. It has worked better than anything I’ve used before. I began using it everyday then once I saw it was making a difference I began to alternate this with castor oil. It really has made my hairline fuller. I would recommend it.

title: Yes! Been waiting for this to stock up!
body: I can’t say enough good things about this product. I have had bad dandruff year round and have tried everything from head and shoulders to Vichy dandruff shampoo, Apple cider vinegar rinses, tea tree, everything and nothing helped until I bought this. I apply about 6 drops directly to my scalp after a shower at night and then just message a bit. ALL my dandruff is completely gone, no more itchiness and the product doesn’t weigh my fine brown hair down. I usually only add a couple products in the day and don’t notice my hair much greasier. I noticed improvements in a week and even my hairdresser sister asked me what I’ve been using. My hair is also a bit thicker on the sides and feels healthier. I’ve had for almost 6 months now and just about half way through the bottle.
I bought this hair serum more than 6 months ago and I'm halfway through the bottle. Been using it every night before bed and I do see some improvement in hair density.
